name: Team Cotton
subject: MUST READ: Senate will confirm Amy Coney Barrett to Supreme Court, despite Democratic threats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
As one of Tom’s most loyal supporters, we wanted to share with you his Fox News op-ed outlining the importance of swiftly confirming Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. The attacks from the radical liberal mob are only just beginning and we are going to need every patriot to stand up and help ensure we cement a conservative majority on the Supreme Court.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=43557413&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjI5MDk2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NTc0MTMS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MjI5MDk2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,
As one of Tom’s most loyal supporters, we wanted to share with you his Fox News op-ed outlining the importance of swiftly confirming Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court.

The attacks from the radical liberal mob are only just beginning and we are going to need every patriot to stand up and help ensure we cement a conservative majority on the Supreme Court.

Stand with Amy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NTc0MTMS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MjI5MDk2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0
- Team Cotton Sen. Tom Cotton: Senate will confirm Amy Coney Barrett to Supreme Court, despite Democratic threats When members of the Senate vote to confirm 7th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court next month, we’ll be following precedent and doing our sworn duty under the Constitution.

There’s nothing unusual or unexpected about the Senate filling a Supreme Court vacancy. The Senate has every right to consider — or not consider — the president’s nominees, however it sees fit.

But that’s not the message you’ll hear if you listen to Democratic politicians and their allies in the media. If you ask them, they’ll tell you this isn’t normal and that the sky is falling — and that Republicans are to blame, as always.

Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., claimed last week that Republicans have “no right” to fill the Supreme Court vacancy. He even said that filling the seat would “spell the end” of the Senate.

If Chuck Schumer really wants to learn more about the Senate’s “right” to confirm judges, he can start by reading the Constitution — specifically Article II, Section 2, where it states that the Senate shall provide “advice and consent” on the president’s judicial nominees.

As for whether confirming a Supreme Court justice would spell the “end of the Senate,” I’d say that’s up to the Democrats to decide — and the signs aren’t hopeful. A lot of Democrats are threatening to blow up the process, the Senate, and the Supreme Court itself if they don’t get their way, just as they’ve done in the past.

For example, Reza Aslan, a former CNN commentator, encouraged his fans to burn the country down if the Senate even tries to confirm a Supreme Court justice before the election. Not that liberals need much encouragement; anti-police rioters and Antifa radicals are already working hard to burn down cities across the country.

My Democratic colleagues in the Senate haven’t reacted much more responsibly. Democratic Sens. Mazie Hirono of Hawaii and Ed Markey of Massachusetts have called for blowing up the filibuster and packing the Supreme Court with Democratic justices if the Senate confirms a Supreme Court nominee before the Jan. 20 presidential inauguration of the candidate elected in November.

Sen. Hirono, who sits on the Judiciary Committee, referred to this radical court-packing plan as “long-overdue court reform.”

And of course, the left-wing media already are doing their part to stoke the fire by spreading vile smears about Judge Barrett, just as they’ve done to Republican Supreme Court nominees like Brett Kavanaugh, Robert Bork, Clarence Thomas and Miguel Estrada.

Judge Barrett is a brilliant legal mind and strong conservative. She also happens to be a Christian mother of seven children. But Democrats and the media have insinuated with no evidence that she wants to turn America into a patriarchal theocracy along the lines of Margaret Atwood’s novel “The Handmaid’s Tale.”

Newsweek even incorrectly reported that Atwood was inspired to write “The Handmaid’s Tale” by a religious community to which Judge Barrett reportedly belongs, called People of Praise. (Newsweek later corrected the story. The group played no part whatsoever in inspiring the book.)

It is laughable that the Democrats are accusing a woman who graduated summa cum laude from Notre Dame Law School and edited its law journal, received tenure at her alma mater as a professor, was confirmed as a federal appeals court judge, and is now a nominee for the Supreme Court of being a secret agent of patriarchy.

It’s even more ridiculous when you look at Judge Barrett’s record, which makes clear she is a constitutional conservative who believes her role is to interpret the law, not to impose her personal opinions on the rest of the country like the activist judges so common on the left.

But the liberal media don’t see their role as reporting the truth. They just want to destroy the reputation of whoever the president dares to select. They seem to think if they repeat their smears long enough, the smears will become true.

Some have suggested, in the face of these threats and smears, that it would be better to postpone voting on a Supreme Court nominee until next year, following the presidential inauguration. They seem to think the best way to prevent further discord is to just surrender and give the Democrats what they want.

But if there’s anything we’ve learned the past few years, it’s that you can’t appease those in the radical base of the Democratic Party. If you give them a special counsel to investigate the president, they’ll impeach the president even though the special counsel comes back emptyhanded. If you nominate a judge with impeccable legal credentials, they’ll stoop to any depth to destroy his character and derail his nomination.

The Democrats’ threats aren’t new. They were threatening to pack the court well before the current vacancy opened with the death of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, which means they’ll pack the court if they have the power and inclination whether we confirm a justice or not. Likewise, whether or not we confirm a justice has little bearing on whether the destruction in our nation’s cities continue.

Instead of wringing our hands about what the Democrats will or will not do, it’s time for Senate Republicans to roll up our sleeves. The left will stomp and storm all it wants. It’s our job to be the adults in the room by confirming Judge Barrett as the next justice to the Supreme Court. Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

name: Bill Olson
subject: NOW is the time to defend life
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I agree with President Trump's strong pro-life stance and I will fight alongside the President to protect the unborn and the born alive!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw

President Trump is doing the right thing for the unborn. He may be the most pro-life President of my lifetime.

This is a man who has remade the Federal Judiciary to become the most pro-life that the judiciary has ever been. He took the liberals' objections and overruled them- so that the most vulnerable among us could live and enjoy all this country offers.

Now Trump has done what no one before him has: protect those babies born alive through a misdone abortion.

President Trump on Wednesday announced he will sign an executive order he says would ensure all babies born alive, including those born prematurely or that survive abortions, receive medical care, in an appeal to conservative and religious voters.

"Today I am announcing that I will be signing the born alive executive order to assure that all precious babies born alive, no matter their circumstances, receive the medical care that they deserve. This is our sacrosanct moral duty," Trump said during a pre-recorded address to the National Catholic Prayer Breakfast.

The president said his administration would also increase federal funding for neonatal research.

The President has done THE RIGHT THING- even in the face of those who believe that not everyone is worthy of life.

"Our nation is strong because of Catholics and all people of faith," Trump said in his address. "We believe in the joy of family, the blessing of freedom and the dignity of work, and the eternal truth that every child, born and unborn, is made in the holy image of God. I will always protect the vital role of religion and prayer in American society, and I will always defend the sacred right to life."

Trump has repeatedly hammered Democrats for supporting abortions later in pregnancy, seizing on proposals in New York and Virginia that would have allowed third-trimester abortions in certain cases where the fetus's or mother's health is at risk.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw

In my experience, in the history of humanity, nothing good ever happens when one group of people decides that another group is not worthy to live.

Yet that is the very essence of Abortion. Deciding one group of people may not live based on their age.

This is what the Democrats want. It's why they are going insane over the replacement of Justice Ginsburg.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw

I will stand up for the unborn, like the President does! I have taken an oath to the United States Constitution, defending her against all foes foreign OR domestic! I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw

If we want to defend our Constitution against the encroachment by the extreme Left, we must stand together NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw

The Democrats can only pack the Supreme Court if they hold the House. If Republicans take Congress from Nancy Pelosi's Democrats, it's all over for their unconstitutional aspirations.

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gcS7fhUBBF6OuRU&b=hL25a8JvZoSjM521r_ptGw
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I hope this email finds you well and to our Jewish friends and neighbors, I wish you a blessed and meaningful Yom Kippur.

This has been a very special week for the Hunt family. On Friday, Emily and I welcomed sweet baby Olivia to the world. Our daughters are a true blessing in our lives and they motivate Emily and me every day to work to secure a brighter future for the next generation.

On Tuesday, I was honored to receive City Council Member Mike Knox's formal endorsement of my campaign in the 7th District. Council Member Knox has led a life of service - from serving in the military to serving in the Houston Police Department and now Houston City Council. I am humbled to have his support and hope to live up to the standard he has set for leaders throughout our city.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=a37ddc6203534a1881e90321c5682544&_e=svH97yffIjqGBK50D0aNjsujVEKZ65QLgFbWYGpc0-XCObov8OeWffdsKm0DHedxSTNjOw6SWoxGUn7q-ZqeLSR2EJn0ibiP0iqW-4N27QR2RWgLFOFFt4QJRsIAJjuoINoEdnLUkVJ-5vLfIi2dlDfMhOl_BFTpVNfrLVCJV0mGWNYTJf7BYAj_QAfs2fvHln3UlQcqaatxhezfHqs04fRP0tZUD0MxfGdgSAm39poJURtG4LaUAZPBdPp2aIGUkYuk8vqhmFwcwmjHh6lBVTH3yS8P1wVr-CqVtDNWM-DqMXonSdWCrGItJrkmAolp)

On Wednesday, we launched our third TV ad of the general election: "[Energy](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=a37ddc6203534a1881e90321c5682544&_e=svH97yffIjqGBK50D0aNjsujVEKZ65QLgFbWYGpc0-XCObov8OeWffdsKm0DHedxplp8snMR2oZ0ntJQY6TC0hfF4SEtyG_JaxTRolV3XDI2-knLciKg3420-y8YdvzlW72NRdslZ59rG3zJavBPCSBPGg8tmRu3MIOFMFoiyJMnzP9Jp6bsJelc20rKRCKs684hbICN_PSvm0MkYEdYDUlf4L_FjNmgYpT53wj4HkKgZoXBqUEIny5wFExxThsu0ZTEhX4_hUDM6Ei3UnN7aX5JYs9aZqsvOif2wWTHJq0Ua6esKp16CYbOXESZX5OE)." Houston is the energy capital of the world and the efficient, affordable, and reliable energy we produce benefits millions of Americans nationwide. As your next Congressman, I will ensure that this vital industry and the hardworking men and women it employs have an advocate in Washington.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=a37ddc6203534a1881e90321c5682544&_e=svH97yffIjqGBK50D0aNjsujVEKZ65QLgFbWYGpc0-XCObov8OeWffdsKm0DHedxplp8snMR2oZ0ntJQY6TC0hfF4SEtyG_JaxTRolV3XDLno1lE08iJF0DsKS5e68jRXEflHUb_7sNJQAEc03vr21eTNVpk-NBdp7uXjGliPvxGF8Vv3xoKR_O-SxVm9XA_SBJO1zbtMrhpKiByuSfYrm8sTFg6jeNlhdjWNNrwRT8eiVAecGW5zAUn9YBBUidOiirVBo6qxJshk6P2AaJhPfGfVrXjkP-4-KfxLpCz6JIXFjuU2PpN5eRUSY1j3lhD)
_In case you missed it_ , on Thursday I release a joint advertisement with Congressman Dan Crenshaw and candidates August Pfluger, Beth Van Duyne, Tony Gonzales, and Genevieve Collins: "[Texas Reloaded](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=a37ddc6203534a1881e90321c5682544&_e=svH97yffIjqGBK50D0aNjh2VgTS3HC7XYgInTEVo44uRnJes8wsqa5R2s0ZtG_9vGkm5lpBfrOVBxH5hed6dSLSRHoNrL-28nYS61wbow_Rz89vfdLHspH-ACZw3QbmIfHB6I2sBsv2XO0QYuCfHuDbfHPn5APDEhA8k9_bnsN97xr1Y6ijTSYmwm5yaKjOIxCR7qM13XRjfXyXi1FUf4hK4OCHYHNDAELPjLYfycMC2bp1PKIAC2VIlGMCSU_91h9nzPkL6ikHBWRXzEgcRXA%3D%3D)." You can find the full advertisement and more details about this new campaign effort [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=a37ddc6203534a1881e90321c5682544&_e=svH97yffIjqGBK50D0aNjh2VgTS3HC7XYgInTEVo44uRnJes8wsqa5R2s0ZtG_9vb_XMcIVwg-YW7fzmNUSCtOjLJv3e-uEcSl8oLSJ8HJjZFcWUmAKTFBTr-IQi5kTCvutl4_bLC8VyAf8ViiwMk2qX4Yi-heah1BML_adcY_CwybCLCW7xlA06Bh65bBDazdHt1aiBnuRFanRMD6YJIR7JSqAE4vNZlFoDVT30R_nNhO0ez4VHVXyuJm5TMahLLhkdw6LmHECVV7Awisy4yA%3D%3D).

clean_body: Friend, I hope this email finds you well and to our Jewish friends and neighbors, I wish you a blessed and meaningful Yom Kippur. This has been a very special week for the Hunt family. On Friday, Emily and I welcomed sweet baby Olivia to the world. Our daughters are a true blessing in our lives and they motivate Emily and me every day to work to secure a brighter future for the next generation. On Tuesday, I was honored to receive City Council Member Mike Knox's formal endorsement of my campaign in the 7th District. Council Member Knox has led a life of service - from serving in the military to serving in the Houston Police Department and now Houston City Council. I am humbled to have his support and hope to live up to the standard he has set for leaders throughout our city. On Wednesday, we launched our third TV ad of the general election: "." Houston is the energy capital of the world and the efficient, affordable, and reliable energy we produce benefits millions of Americans nationwide. As your next Congressman, I will ensure that this vital industry and the hardworking men and women it employs have an advocate in Washington. In case you missed it , on Thursday I release a joint advertisement with Congressman Dan Crenshaw and candidates August Pfluger, Beth Van Duyne, Tony Gonzales, and Genevieve Collins: "." You can find the full advertisement and more details about this new campaign effort . We are now less than 40 days out from election day and I am incredibly encouraged by all that we have accomplished in the 7th District. We still have a great deal of work to do, but I want to thank you for all you have done to get us to this point. As your next Representative, I will continue to work every day to earn your support. Thank you, Wesley **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

body:
We're running out of time |
---
Hi friend. Ellen Foster here, Jon Ossoff's campaign manager.

We're running out of time to get Jon's message out to voters before they cast their ballots.

Absentee voting is already underway here in Georgia, and the last day of voting is in just over FIVE WEEKS.

**It's CRITICAL we hit our $200,000 grassroots fundraising goal by Wednesday's end-of-quarter deadline.**

**_I'm planning our budget for the last few weeks of the campaign, and I want to be able to scale up our voter mobilization efforts to give Jon the best chance of winning._**

**[Friend, I know this grassroots team has come through time and time again, but I wanted to give a little extra push to make sure we hit that $200,000 target. Can you chip in $20 by tonight to keep us on track to reach our goal and elect Jon Ossoff to the United States Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e4b/5b2c1286/3b5adbfe/25f242c9/2773216438/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_27_ellen_bef_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_27_ellen_bef_eoq&amount=20")**

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Urgent request: Need to talk to you about Eugene DePasquale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
My number one focus has been fighting to protect and expand our Democratic House Majority, and Eugene DePasquale in PA-10 is essential to that mission.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19657378/253948421/-1332358803?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b1_np_all-nd&refcode2=a124de31-a001-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTI0ZGUzMS1hMDAxLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sLBxpSG-lc-ojFemnz3aEc6TCsLomsaOHzqUT8nEvuM=) Friend,

The most important election of our lifetime is just a little over a month away, and as we’ve seen, everything is on the line this November. **My number one focus has been fighting to protect and expand our Democratic House Majority, and Eugene DePasquale in PA-10 is essential to that mission.**

[**Eugene is facing his final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before the election. This is a critical turning point in his campaign, and it will set the stage for the final month of the race. name: Josh Hawley
subject: DON'T LET DEMS BLOCK THIS NOMINEE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
We have a major opportunity to help President Trump keep his promise to confirm a strong conservative justice to the Supreme Court! Dear Peter, **We have a major opportunity to help President Trump keep his promise to confirm a strong conservative justice to the Supreme Court!** You have probably heard that _**President Trump nominated Amy Coney Barrett to fill this vacancy on the highest court in the land.**_ Rather than following what the Constitution says, and what America’s founders intended though, **Democrats are trying to block her confirmation out of pure partisan dissent.** The American people elected President Trump and a Republican Senate to fulfill their Constitutional duty. **_We need your help_** to fulfill one of President Trump’s most important promises to the American people. _**Can we count on you? **_ [**Donate _HERE_ \- _Help us Fill this Seat!_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=3f5a53248e6d43e293b95eb509fc51cc&_e=wP_Rm3WjtRvOrCfP5tZ1bTQAKmp-uHAqsOIOXp9adK_4WfsO8bKS9NH_maG6risHEUhm2hZNslzdRgJbELRAxeICE7GQq3PjJoxzdQAJufZdukJCoJOqL_RugLlun_67lKNAYLMSbKpD7PEuuH_iY5Qf7RDBKic3FJfrk9DbveEiMZZYVyzyJgkyVcAybaNyvdSgIV76fphuqzLCLX6xgEPqCoj5ru8QASqQVZoZcxW2PYw9_8YZaXGGp12jW4C9Kmigrx6lcOd-kCxjePiePVGDwN3hOG-_RrFNkElg6qlnfoe5LJi51qe2WmYHVmyhRZ1elPRxuZwbmh9m_9KcdMiFs0QD01aY57fUQ0nb5EIF575FbZbvctBbVkBfvtMRhKppdVpl-IC5uVf28j8F0DmoB_OTmmx_ci1-_GmGM5U%3D) We cannot allow Democrats to block President Trump’s nominee out of disdain for our president. **President Trump’s nominee deserves a fair vote before the Senate!** [**Do YOU believe Trumps nominee deserves a vote? If we want to send Jackie Walorski home, [we need your help to amplify Pat’s message](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=016bb4ce21&e=5886ca081d) and let Hoosiers know that she will represent the people of this district -- unlike her opponent.

We’re preparing to air a television commercial, and our field organizers are spending hours on the phone every day.

We’re also anxiously awaiting the delivery of new campaign yard signs. If you have not already requested a yard sign, you can complete the online form. We will add you to our list and send you details ASAP when they're available.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: We need 993 donations by Wednesday
body:
I am in this race because I care about the people of this district. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3e78f0aac814/we-need-993-donations-by-wednesday?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I am in this race because I care about the people of this district.

I see my neighbors, friends, and family members struggling just to get by in one of the wealthiest countries of the world. Our unemployment rate is higher than the national average, our rural hospitals are being closed down, and farmers all across this district have fallen victim to an unnecessary trade war. And to top it all off, **we don’t have adequate representation in Congress.**

My opponent has earned himself a reputation for absenteeism - both in IL-16 and the House floor. When he does decide to take a break from CNN interviews and grace the halls of the Capitol with his presence, he presents one of the most anti-woman and anti-LGBTQ records of Congress.

But I know I don’t have to convince you, so I will keep this short: **we need 993 donations before the end of the month** if we are going to stay on track. It will show to everyone that our army of grassroots supporters stands as strong as ever. If we do this and stay on track, we will win this election.

We have a lot of supporters and donors, way more than the 993 donations we need, so I know that we can do this. Every single bit counts - whether it’s $3 or $300. [So, can I count on you to chip in and help us stay on track?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=40e5a8a5d1&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

clean_body: I am in this race because I care about the people of this district. | | | | | | | I am in this race because I care about the people of this district. I see my neighbors, friends, and family members struggling just to get by in one of the wealthiest countries of the world. Our unemployment rate is higher than the national average, our rural hospitals are being closed down, and farmers all across this district have fallen victim to an unnecessary trade war. And to top it all off, we don’t have adequate representation in Congress. My opponent has earned himself a reputation for absenteeism - both in IL-16 and the House floor. When he does decide to take a break from CNN interviews and grace the halls of the Capitol with his presence, he presents one of the most anti-woman and anti-LGBTQ records of Congress. But I know I don’t have to convince you, so I will keep this short: we need 993 donations before the end of the month if we are going to stay on track. It will show to everyone that our army of grassroots supporters stands as strong as ever. If we do this and stay on track, we will win this election. We have a lot of supporters and donors, way more than the 993 donations we need, so I know that we can do this. Every single bit counts - whether it’s $3 or $300. Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16 | "Click here to chip in" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Dani for Illinois, All rights reserved.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I'm voting for Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Taking back the Senate starts in Georgia. |
---
**Friend, Election Day is 36 days away, and the stakes couldn't be higher.**
Republican leaders have turned their backs on Americans all over the country -- in the middle of a global pandemic, in the face of widespread racism, and on the brink of an economic catastrophe.

**There is no path to save our democracy this year that doesn't involve taking back the U.S. Senate --_and right now U.S Senate candidate Jon Ossoff is narrowly leading GOP Senator David Perdue in several polls._**

**[That's why I'm asking, friend: Can you rush $20 RIGHT NOW to elect my friend, Jon Ossoff, to the United States Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e2f/5b2c1286/3b42e437/25f241da/36866433/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq&amount=20")**
| | [DONATE $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e2f/5b2c1286/3b42e437/25f241da/36866433/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq&amount=20")
---

Three years ago, Jon came up just a few thousand votes short in his race for Georgia's Sixth District.

Then, in this year's June primary election, **Georgia Democrats SHATTERED voter turnout records** in nominating him. Not to mention, **_Georgia Democrats actually outnumbered Georgia Republicans in June!_**

Jon's movement is building more and more momentum each day, friend.

But here's the thing: **Jon has a CRITICAL deadline coming up Wednesday.** We have two more days until the end of the quarter, and he needs to hit his grassroots fundraising goal by the end of the day to stay on track to win.

**[Right now, will you make a donation to help propel Jon Ossoff's campaign in the final weeks of the election and ensure we have a Democrat representing Georgia in the U.S. Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e2f/5b2c1286/3b42e437/25f241dd/36866433/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq")**

__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__
| **[$10->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e2f/5b2c1286/3b42e437/25f241dc/36866433/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_09_28_stacey_eoq_ex_10")**

Stacey Abrams

body:
He’s allegedly funneled tens of thousands in Russian cash to illegally help a Republican super PAC. He doesn’t even deny he did it, but only that he didn’t know the details. And that leaves us with two bad options:

Folks, Pete Sessions has made his living putting his own interests and aspirations over Texans. He allegedly funneled tens of thousands in Russian cash to illegally help a Republican super PAC. He doesn’t even deny he did it, only that he didn’t know the details. And that leaves us with two bad options: **He either had an unforgivable lapse in judgment, becoming a pawn for Vladimir Putin, or he willingly helped a foreign power influence our elections -- which is a felony.** Either way, Pete Sessions has proven time and again that he cannot be trusted to represent our interests in Washington, either from malice or sheer stupidity. It’s up to us -- Texans who care about protecting our community from his corruption -- to defeat him. Again. Recent polling has us statistically tied with Sessions, but we have to push ahead. **Our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is Wednesday at midnight, and we still need to raise another $10,381.[_Can we count on your support today? And that leaves us with two bad options: He either had an unforgivable lapse in judgment, becoming a pawn for Vladimir Putin, or he willingly helped a foreign power influence our elections -- which is a felony. Either way, Pete Sessions has proven time and again that he cannot be trusted to represent our interests in Washington, either from malice or sheer stupidity. It’s up to us -- Texans who care about protecting our community from his corruption -- to defeat him. Again. Recent polling has us statistically tied with Sessions, but we have to push ahead. | Patriot,
On Saturday, President Trump nominated Amy Coney Barrett to replace Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg and fill the vacancy on the Supreme Court.
She is an excellent choice to become a member of our Supreme Court. Not only does she love America, she upholds the Constitution and respects our laws. Kat believes that a person should be nominated not because they check a box but because they are the best person for the job. Amy Coney Barrett is that person.
Despite President Trump's excellent nominee and the fact that he is fulfilling his JOB as President, liberals are unhappy with our President's decision to fill the vacancy and replace Justice Ginsburg!
Nancy Pelosi and the liberal mob have openly declared that they are willing to seek the IMPEACHMENT route, YET AGAIN just to STOP our President from working for US!
The previous Russian hoax was not only COSTLY for tax-payers, it took a toll on the American people. President Trump has to face these ludicrous vendettas from the left on a daily basis. It has to stop.

| Friends, Let's talk about which NH Senate candidates are offering real choice in education reform and improvement here in New Hampshire. Over the past few years, Governor Sununu and the New Hampshire Republicans have led the way on true education reform in our state. Republicans have fought to give parents more control over where their children go to school - after all, it is the parent who best knows how a child learns. Additionally, NH Republicans have championed student safety. Thanks to the efforts of Senate Republicans this past session, the state passed new laws protecting our students from inappropriate student-teacher relationships. Meanwhile, NH Democrats have done everything that they can to prevent our schools from improving. Just this past month, the four opponents of these Republican candidates once again blocked the state from accepting a $46 million federal grant for charter schools which enhances school choice for parents. They fear educational choice and opportunity will loosen the influence of their political allies. Remember, when it comes to education, Republicans want what is best for parents and students. Republicans understand that students need an opportunity to thrive not a one size fits all approach to learning. Below find our list of the top Republican champions for New Hampshire education reform:

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friends, Let's talk about which NH Senate candidates are offering real choice in education reform and improvement here in New Hampshire. Over the past few years, Governor Sununu and the New Hampshire Republicans have led the way on true education reform in our state. Republicans have fought to give parents more control over where their children go to school - after all, it is the parent who best knows how a child learns. Additionally, NH Republicans have championed student safety. Thanks to the efforts of Senate Republicans this past session, the state passed new laws protecting our students from inappropriate student-teacher relationships. Meanwhile, NH Democrats have done everything that they can to prevent our schools from improving. Just this past month, the four opponents of these Republican candidates once again blocked the state from accepting a $46 million federal grant for charter schools which enhances school choice for parents. They fear educational choice and opportunity will loosen the influence of their political allies. Remember, when it comes to education, Republicans want what is best for parents and students. Republicans understand that students need an opportunity to thrive not a one size fits all approach to learning. Below find our list of the top Republican champions for New Hampshire education reform: | | | | | | Champions of Education Reform and Improvement in NH | | | | | | | | Erin Hennessey (R-Littleton) Fought for increased school choice including charter schools, homeschooling and religious schools Voted to increase student safety | | | | | | | | | | | | Denise Ricciardi (R-Bedford) Supports increased school choice! Will fight to increase school safety for our students | | | | | | | | | | | | Carla Gericke (R-Manchester) Supports increased school choice! Will fight to increase school safety for our students | | | | | | | | | | | | Bill Gannon (R-Sandown) Supports increased school choice! Will fight to increase school safety for our students | | | | | | | | | | Senate GOP Victory 2020 is an initiative of the Jeb Bradley for State Senate Campaign to win back a GOP majority in the NH Senate! Every dollar collected though this initiative will be distributed to the Republican Senators and Senate candidates in the most competitive races in NH. name: Sri Kulkarni
subject: Can you donate $10?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend --

I’ll get right to the point: Can you donate $10 or more right now to our campaign? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b1_sk_all&amount=10

I’m facing my last major quarterly FEC deadline at the end of this month, and could really use your help.

In the last stretch of this campaign, we’ve seen polls showing us tied with our opponent and Joe Biden running just 2 points down in Texas against Trump at the top of the ticket. This is great news for our campaign, BUT last week we also received news that one of the biggest Republican Super PACs in the entire country will spend nearly a million dollars on ads against Democrats in the Houston area between now and Election Day.

Let me be clear: This kind of outside spending could cost us the election.

If you can, please donate $10 or more now to help us respond and keep our own ads on the air >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b1_sk_all&amount=10

Despite my opponent’s dangerous far-right record, the DC establishment is doubling down on their support for him in a last ditch effort to change this seat from flipping blue in November.

The DC establishment knows that if they spend enough money propping up Troy Nehls, not only will they keep this congressional seat red --- they’ll also be able to stop Joe Biden from flipping Texas blue and guaranteeing the White House for Democrats.

We can’t let this happen.

If we lose the House and the White House this fall, we will also lose our last line of defense in the fight to protect health care for those with pre-existing conditions, ensure a woman’s right to choose, and keep Medicare intact.

Please -- if you can -- our campaign needs your help to stay on the air and keep talking to voters. Even just $10 will go along.
Here’s a link to donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b1_sk_all&amount=10

Thank you,
Sri

Can you make it weekly?
Friend -- we’re just 6 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b1_sk_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b1_sk_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3f028e43-a701-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc/8d0c202a-b801-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDBjMjAyYS1iODAxLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yAzUf_pQp_3xbRVei8t-hrwbEcV9DGPItY8QJCGnMVs=&id=117373579 .

body:
We’ve made a lot of progress over the last four years, but here’s the truth — there’s still a lot of work to be done to build One Indiana for All. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0adc784ce9fd48eaba3346d14934104e&_e=rzSneZWFktIYWsoFIRuIBLVf1Y6xYJNYIs6O1_gLVYPVKaRFgeDkPY6FB0i6vTf1mwweTTLXYYKMYfUMyGFj2WTzEiLGuOqbAaeMjJSvccBZHvRK4PXacixw8HgS9D3Uv-VQzgkftTRBRtliffVM2ArMloGcYVnIxVKmrWRHhrygnRQT2IJL-9cxeu32M9EKc2A6rUGQMNewB6bgYrpshsI4Q5Ty9d-fAAZ-Gd68DjV636tR8IG4Y5t8JmKCvi8d8vav6arqHIeekmagwqL7hoY7e8U-UneYvPQ5Qgq58bg0WNUCp3mMP-lNCEsqdPPYHg15bMr1TptzO_qHwAqhvwmLZUwaydGQI0VhI_avPMl_Y_YTfd4PqHROUMODrQmCZu8C7oeL2-8st_4Wb48hSw7oA_qckFbd9A9H_F5JnwOgKr2UrrvkPZimyfc0OYgIkwps0mYwzS1mtAHEqO05EzMYqSb9azC_5Qnz74hmGhI%3D) |

Hey friend - we’re reaching out today because we have an urgent request.

_Our final End of Quarter fundraising deadline before Election Day is this Wednesday (September 30th) at midnight. _

This is one of the last big fundraising opportunities we have left before Election Day, and we’re reaching out to every member of our grassroots community and asking them to help us capitalize on this opportunity.

We’ve made a lot of progress over the last four years, but here’s the truth — there’s still a lot of work to be done to build One Indiana for All.

If we want to keep building on the best infrastructure in the country, getting our economy back on track, helping Hoosiers skill-up for high-wage careers, and much, much more, we need to go all in until Election Day.

**That’s why we’re asking every single one of our supporters to chip in before our End of Quarter deadline hits. **

Friend, can we count on you to come through for us and help push our campaign over the line on Election Day? Donate before our deadline ends below.
[**Support Eric’s campaign**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0adc784ce9fd48eaba3346d14934104e&_e=rzSneZWFktIYWsoFIRuIBLVf1Y6xYJNYIs6O1_gLVYPVKaRFgeDkPY6FB0i6vTf1mwweTTLXYYKMYfUMyGFj2WTzEiLGuOqbAaeMjJSvccBZHvRK4PXacixw8HgS9D3Uv-VQzgkftTRBRtliffVM2ArMloGcYVnIxVKmrWRHhrygnRQT2IJL-9cxeu32M9EKc2A6rUGQMNewB6bgYrpshsI4Q5Ty9d-fAAZ-Gd68DjV636tR8IG4Y5t8JmKCvi8d8vav6arqHIeekmagwqL7hh-BfKOxGmKeK4geIBIdQcgIKY515l34MRKKwUcv2rfEbboj6l3cOB-yKkffF85AstJaWx-nR38oyb6SIfsRxTi8LU2rTz-xHGfA4JKOLDreSqCngnHmv_l57S0OvVjEJhgt7F28Xc1Dpg3ghecSroxvcRzzmwPMyZPo4q2h9tUULHTLHy1ZJJtvPtMyq-aTS2tOQ2M8PWDAQBNdlKw72lg%3D)
Thank you for your support.

Best,
Holcomb Crew

subject: Fill the Supreme Court Seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mJtIbUr8GUGUNWaw01DVLcKsduU1TkDxdA2ByqnjsyefP139_Te5iMZ5snOu3BBMFVwRiJlE9An7GmBFp7-cGXx_vLntvL6c55JNQmbAjw1iDPy5uKPNOUPDVShW9Wn0tCvfLxr4Ka4dJc3r0jVAlFD7dVRR10V4bIeXg-7AoRzSYuEKIFq0g5AhLJF-_qgM&c=lcjfaT5GDDuCYo8Sli9U7_rP-AkNh_y0CR4KQZA92HjR5EzC3OrWUQ==&ch=QihKjaItKeprNmEJR22Ip85NDlgrPVlWECGVMCdhN8-uqOC4t27enQ==)

| Peter,
Republicans are facing one of the biggest battles in recent history after President Trump nominated Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. The Democrats are going to do everything they can to delay, obstruct, and destroy Judge Barrett.
Remember what they did to Brett Kavanaugh?
We need to come together and demand that Amy Coney Barrett be confirmed to the Supreme Court. [Will you join this fight by signing our petition?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mJtIbUr8GUGUNWaw01DVLcKsduU1TkDxdA2ByqnjsyefP139_Te5iMZ5snOu3BBMFVwRiJlE9An7GmBFp7-cGXx_vLntvL6c55JNQmbAjw1iDPy5uKPNOUPDVShW9Wn0tCvfLxr4Ka4dJc3r0jVAlFD7dVRR10V4bIeXg-7AoRzSYuEKIFq0g5AhLJF-_qgM&c=lcjfaT5GDDuCYo8Sli9U7_rP-AkNh_y0CR4KQZA92HjR5EzC3OrWUQ==&ch=QihKjaItKeprNmEJR22Ip85NDlgrPVlWECGVMCdhN8-uqOC4t27enQ==)

---
| When Brett Kavanaugh was nominated, the Democrats smeared him, accused him of sexual assault, and humiliated his family in front of the entire country. It was one of the lowest moments in our history.
Now, the attacks on Judge Barrett are starting. They are already attacking her for being a woman of faith and a mother of seven. The Democrats are only going to go lower, so we have to step up now.
I hope you'll [sign our petition](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mJtIbUr8GUGUNWaw01DVLcKsduU1TkDxdA2ByqnjsyefP139_Te5iMZ5snOu3BBMFVwRiJlE9An7GmBFp7-cGXx_vLntvL6c55JNQmbAjw1iDPy5uKPNOUPDVShW9Wn0tCvfLxr4Ka4dJc3r0jVAlFD7dVRR10V4bIeXg-7AoRzSYuEKIFq0g5AhLJF-_qgM&c=lcjfaT5GDDuCYo8Sli9U7_rP-AkNh_y0CR4KQZA92HjR5EzC3OrWUQ==&ch=QihKjaItKeprNmEJR22Ip85NDlgrPVlWECGVMCdhN8-uqOC4t27enQ==) to confirm Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court to ensure a conservative Court for many years to come!

| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mJtIbUr8GUGUNWaw01DVLcKsduU1TkDxdA2ByqnjsyefP139_Te5iMZ5snOu3BBMFVwRiJlE9An7GmBFp7-cGXx_vLntvL6c55JNQmbAjw1iDPy5uKPNOUPDVShW9Wn0tCvfLxr4Ka4dJc3r0jVAlFD7dVRR10V4bIeXg-7AoRzSYuEKIFq0g5AhLJF-_qgM&c=lcjfaT5GDDuCYo8Sli9U7_rP-AkNh_y0CR4KQZA92HjR5EzC3OrWUQ==&ch=QihKjaItKeprNmEJR22Ip85NDlgrPVlWECGVMCdhN8-uqOC4t27enQ==)

name: Secretary Rick Perry
subject: Keeping the Senate RED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
The Senate is the president’s last line of defense. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/1217388cab588357c3d6b838967d376c/33153)Peter, I’ve been fighting hard to keep President Trump in the Oval Office, and now I need your help to keep the Senate RED. _Chuck Schumer and the radical left are doing everything they can to block President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee, Amy Coney Barrett, from being confirmed._ They want Joe Biden & Kamala Harris to pick the next Supreme Court justice — and they’re counting on having the Senate majority to get the confirmation done. **The Democrats know that their path to flipping the Senate blue runs through New Hampshire, where Corky Messner is running to defeat radical liberal Jeanne Shaheen. They KNOW that if they lose this seat, they can kiss any chance of a Democrat majority in the Senate goodbye**. **Unlike DC Jeanne Shaheen, Corky isn’t a politician**. He’s a businessman, a veteran, and a proud conservative. He’s served before — now he’s ready to serve again. **Will you please help me support Corky by chipping in what you can now?**[ DONATE $250](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/d2ff374f69892a6bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)[DONATE $125](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/605438ea766d7dd4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)[DONATE $75](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/c94f085f7f826698c3d6b838967d376c/33153)[DONATE $35](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/e439cff1ae81ece4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)[DONATE $10](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/f36ac40c70a76337c3d6b838967d376c/33153)[DONATE $5](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/3f0c2eeaf8a4e4c1c3d6b838967d376c/33153)We must KEEP the Senate RED in November... and we also must seize this enormous opportunity to FLIP a seat in New Hampshire. **Doing so would guarantee a Republican Senate majority**. **Corky Messner can win this race, but he needs your immediate help**. We’re counting on your swift response.

Secretary Rick Perry[DONATE NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/7caa5e9c2f55222ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/871b740b772c40fdc3d6b838967d376c/33153)| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/33b732c608475e47/1f154677324c9f9cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Nick Freitas
subject: defund the police? Ask Abigail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, Abigail Spanberger can’t seem to make up her mind about whether or not we need to “Defund the Police” in Virginia. **But I’ve always believed actions speak louder than words.** So when Spanberger claims she does not want to Defund the Police, _her words ring hollow._ _Not only has she already marched with a far-left Defund the Police group, chanting alongside them,_ **she is raking in money from a nationwide network of liberal donors, courtesy of Nancy Pelosi -- who is no friend of law and order (ask anyone who’s been to San Francisco lately).** Abigail can claim she does not support Defunding the Police, but we can’t let her pull the wool over the eyes of Virginia voters. We’re on a mission to set the record straight about Abigail Spanberger and the left-wing agenda she represents, so please **[donate to our FREEDOM FIGHTERS FINAL FIGHT FUND and help crush our VERY LAST end-of-quarter fundraising goal. clean_body: Friend, Abigail Spanberger can’t seem to make up her mind about whether or not we need to “Defund the Police” in Virginia. But I’ve always believed actions speak louder than words. So when Spanberger claims she does not want to Defund the Police, her words ring hollow. Not only has she already marched with a far-left Defund the Police group, chanting alongside them, she is raking in money from a nationwide network of liberal donors, courtesy of Nancy Pelosi -- who is no friend of law and order (ask anyone who’s been to San Francisco lately). Abigail can claim she does not support Defunding the Police, but we can’t let her pull the wool over the eyes of Virginia voters. We’re on a mission to set the record straight about Abigail Spanberger and the left-wing agenda she represents, so please In combat, I learned that words inspire action, and those actions have consequences. name: Molly Keenan, JayInslee.com
subject: Some governors fly flags half-staff. Some have committed their careers to supporting reproductive rights.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is why state leadership matters.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8163%2E868730%2ERbh1Rq) Friend, Last week, the Republican Governors Association retweeted GOP governors across the country who pledged to honor the life of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg by lowering their flags to half-staff. But all of those governors have conveniently forgotten that they could do much more to honor her life -- like expanding reproductive choice for people in their states. This is why state leadership is so important: Governor Inslee is Washington's most important line of defense to protect our constitutional rights -- regardless of what happens at the Supreme Court. But the RGA isn't just sending a few tweets. They're preparing to spend their historically large war chest to beat back Democratic progress -- and we are one of the very few states where they can go on offense. The attacks are coming, and now more than ever, we have to be prepared. **Governors like Jay are now all that stands between the American people and a GOP takeover. That's why we have to make sure he's reelected this fall:[We have a $75,000 goal to hit by Wednesday night, and we're $27,896 short. Will you donate $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11921?t=4&akid=8163%2E868730%2ERbh1Rq)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11922?t=5&akid=8163%2E868730%2ERbh1Rq)

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Fletcher Fuels Division in DC Amidst Coronavirus Negotiations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Fletcher Fuels Division in DC Amidst Coronavirus Negotiations**

Houston, TX - As partisan Democrats continue to block compromise on coronavirus relief, residents in the 7th District are experiencing the consequences of a Congresswoman who answers to Nancy Pelosi rather than her voters. Under Pelosi's leadership, which Representative Fletcher has supported over 99% of the time, Democrats have seized on every opportunity to retreat to the extreme enclaves of their party rather than compromise to secure aid for the American people. Congressional Democrats' refusal to negotiate with Republicans has harmed the very people they vowed to serve, and the situation in the 7th District is no different.

Fletcher has not just failed to advocate for Houston and build compromise during our time of need; she has also acted to increase divisions in Washington and remained complacent as Pelosi tries to use coronavirus relief for political leverage. This summer, Fletcher supported the immensely partisan _HEROES Act_ , a $3 trillion bill that stifled coronavirus relief with left-wing agenda items, and pushed additional legislation that furthered to the toxic discord in Washington.

Fletcher even helped her party levy an attack against Houston's Energy Corridor by transforming much-needed infrastructure relief into the '_Green New Deal 2.0_ ,' compounding the hardships of the coronavirus lockdowns. Fletcher's support for this unprecedentedly partisan infrastructure bill, in which 2 out of every $5 supports the _Green New Deal_ , was a particularly acute offense for Houston voters as Fletcher has failed to condemn her party's anti-energy policies and has allowed Pelosi to deny stimulus relief for Houston's Energy Corridor.

At a time when the American people urgently need compromise, Fletcher's actions have only contributed to the partisanship in Washington. Seventh District residents need a representative who will be part of the solution, not a feigned moderate who contributes to the disunity harming the American people.

###
****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5e49349964874575b0e79f5cfab16047&_e=8qff3H6r-5SiJtYheAdzeXAM1nSHXAHf_JUMGB_hdr5M2_ilzP5f9zy-sit9QAUavSWFZ_zB0PUdrRq71BgHz2QP2ryXn-omFYiL70CisiwfSZLdpKkqQM_hEs4jhyzAmCfTg-AROtm1p7e8sM42GqQ93abX15pQ_h1hQL5VpV2yw37vpBEBtzfDOie8HKxSliNqBUckyvybMO0K8OUZOK-phJM4U7oTk-akkGnT1LIa3ZO4xsd2XPseKwqs0wn4Ch-yQUuFVIoufh1Y8_sw2rg-naulcrca4zwbm-LN0g0%3D)****

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Time to rein in prescription drug prices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | Dear , This stark billboard outside a boarded-up community pharmacy caught my attention as I was traveling in Western PA. This is yet another story of a small business shut down along with its good family sustaining jobs, leaving the community at the mercy of large corporate pharmacies with run-away prescription costs! **_We must stop this destruction of our economy and jobs and the price gouging of our most vulnerable residents with crushing drug prices. _** And, as Auditor General, I can shine the light on this shadowy third-party player, the Pharmacy Benefit Manager (PBM) that sits at the middle of the supply chain of drug manufacturing, insurance reimbursements and prescription costs. PBMs are supposed to use their purchasing power to negotiate rebates and discounts from drug manufacturers and better reimbursements from insurers and pass those savings to community pharmacies who would then pass savings directly to patients. We now know that many of these PBMs are owned by large pharmaceutical companies and health insurers, that are keeping most of the rebates and fees rather than passing lower prices on to the community pharmacies and their patients. The PBMs often also require community pharmacists to sign take-it-or-leave-it contracts with unduly restrictive clauses, thus making it impossible for community pharmacies to maintain revenue-leading to forced closures. **_The time has come to end the PBMs ' lack of transparency, lack of oversight, and reimbursement disparity._** As the **People 's Auditor**, I want to scrutinize why Pennsylvania taxpayers paid $2.86 billion to PBMs for Medicaid enrollees in 2017, which a 100 percent increase from $1.41 billion paid in 2013. I will provide taxpayers clear information that they deserve to know about the factors that drive cost disproportionately higher, and work with the General Assembly to rein in runaway costs of prescription drugs. Help me cross the finish line to become your next Auditor General, so I can continue to support legislation and reform efforts around PBM's throughout PA. Will you join me in changing policies that Only Help a Few?? **[Can you donate $5, $10 or $20.20, $100 today? Here is a link to my donation page.](https://act.myngp.com/el/454cT6oBuJ0Ksfx0lZX6u7EtGEmh10OPXtIQRi1w-LI=/qn5JFEhUU_1MlQU1koD1YaxFq08I6DMos3_Qve8O5MM=)** In advance, thank you for joining me! Together we can truly "Leave No One Behind" Sincerely, Dr. Nina [](https://act.myngp.com/el/454cT6oBuJ0Ksfx0lZX6u7EtGEmh10OPXtIQRi1w-LI=/qn5JFEhUU_1MlQU1koD1YaxFq08I6DMos3_Qve8O5MM=) Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/454cT6oBuJ0Ksfx0lZX6u7EtGEmh10OPXtIQRi1w-LI=/sz6lx12v0kV4MMmpQfg0o2oV2oPr1H82McKudoBKrQQ=)_** Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/454cT6oBuJ0Ksfx0lZX6u7EtGEmh10OPXtIQRi1w-LI=/jCl9zOLRr1Y2-scpYgQrrdRmCTHwowfyYIJDTTsiF2Q=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/454cT6oBuJ0Ksfx0lZX6u7EtGEmh10OPXtIQRi1w-LI=/YMgsskLJzsezOm8ckmRmkD6pRCWmnr7OXvQ2MzSINLU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/454cT6oBuJ0Ksfx0lZX6u7EtGEmh10OPXtIQRi1w-LI=/mjWbpmCCTznVjhsR7AITHmhFpOroMrtIto-uAbRWSXI=?hl=en)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Fight for Trump’s nominee & Get Out The Vote. Week of Sept. 28th Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
Over the course of the next 35 days, we likely have two major priorities (unless something else also comes up!). One is to support President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee, and the other is to Get Out The Vote and win the election!

So, the calls-to-action will mostly revolve around those two topics for the next several weeks. Remember, time is our most important resource because we can’t get any more of it, so let’s use it wisely!

We also have an exciting announcement to share immediately below.

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Launch of ‘Moms for Safe Neighborhoods’
Today, a new organization of concerned mothers is launching called Moms for Safe Neighborhoods. Jenny Beth is on the advisory board, and below is a message about this new organization from her and the other board members.
_“Our purpose it to help re-elect President Trump so we can keep our children and communities safe. We’ve seen Biden and the Democrats undermine our safety during these national protests by calling for money to be diverted away from the police and waiting too long to call out violence around the country. By re-electing President Trump, we are making sure we will have policies in place to keep our families and communities safe and strong. _

_“We want to share the message of safety and security to other moms, in particular suburban moms, across the country before the election. _

_“We are getting our message out immediately with a national ad campaign which will roll out this week on The Today Show, Fox Network, A &E;, E! and Bravo. I would also love your help getting the message out! Below is our website, our social media, and graphics you should feel free to share. I hope you will join me in getting our message out there that President Trump is the best choice for the safety of our children. And please follow us on Twitter here: [MomsSafe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AQE1vbXNTYWZlP21pZD00MjcyOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=KdY6ulTHLq8UMDk3zyoXrw).”_
[**Website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9tc2ZvcnNhZmVuZWlnaGJvcmhvb2RzLmNvbS8_bWlkPTQyNzI5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=LOwKEfh3ejhfNHqKGcaQlw) | [**Television Ad**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly92aW1lby5jb20vNDYxMzkxODE1P21pZD00MjcyOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=G84nfPPyqdWFPuDokG6Dgg) | **[Twitter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9Nb21zU2FmZT9taWQ9NDI3MjkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=9azx6e7waKNO7qhjw7GVHQ)** | [**Facebook**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL01vbXMtZm9yLVNhZmUtTmVpZ2hib3Job29kcy0xMDc1MDkzNTQ0Mzc3MjM_bWlkPTQyNzI5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=pb2Se2oMRU0GYE8O78OKUw) | **[Instagram](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9tb21zZm9yc2FmZW5laWdoYm9yaG9vZHMvP21pZD00MjcyOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=iiixh52V9i09N9rPI4r35A)**

Supreme Court Action
**Plan Weekly Sign Waving Events Now**
We are asking for activists to organize nationwide sign waving/flag waving events on the following dates now:
* This Thursday, October 1st
* Thursday, October 8th
* Monday, October 12th
* Thursday, October 15th
* Thursday, October 29th
* Monday, November 2nd

Scheduling weekly events keeps our messaging fresh in people’s minds, and cuts through the lies and hysteria from the mainstream media and the left about Amy Coney Barrett and President Trump.

**Since we aren’t sure when the actual confirmation vote will take place, it’s a good idea to plan for the October 1st, 8th, 12th, and 15th to have signs promoting Judge Barrett’s confirmation to SCOTUS. Feel free to encourage American flags and any other messages you’d like to be present.**

We will update you as the process moves forward with messages and suggestions. Once she is confirmed, we won’t need to promote that anymore, but we will still need to share other messages about President Trump, etc.

Additionally, if you schedule these ahead of time and let your network know, you will have better turnout than if you wait to schedule them.

Sample Amy Coney Barrett Sign Messages:
* Fill the Seat Now!
* Confirm Amy Coney Barrett now!
* Amy Coney Barrett loves the Constitution! Fill the Seat Now!
* Honk if you want the Senate to Fill the Seat Now! #ACB

**Call your Republican Senator About the Supreme Court**
Call your Republican Senator(s) and tell them to Fill the Seat Now, before the election. Tell them to stay strong against the attacks from the left, and that the American people will have their backs.

If you don’t know your Senator’s phone number, you can use the Capitol Switchboard number. Simply call [(202) 224-3121](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNDMxMjE_bWlkPTQyNzI5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=-2kimaZIpi2K-sFHJKy3Aw "tel:2022243121") and ask for your Senator by name and you will be connected. If you need to look up the name and party of your Senators, [use the map on this page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5zZW5hdGUuZ292L3N0YXRlcy9zdGF0ZXNtYXAuaHRtP21pZD00MjcyOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Qz7B4658VC2AIcdCKGpLWw). Just click on your state and it will show you your Senators.

**Sign up for our Supreme Court Action Coalition Group**
If you received an email last week with a notice that we are reactivating the Trump Defense Team/Fight Impeachment group, then you are already on this email list. If you didn’t receive that email, then you will want to make sure you get signed up for the coalition group that will work to support President Trump’s SCOTUS nominee. You will receive emails with messaging, news, action items, and more that are specific to this Supreme Court seat fight. **[Sign up here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ncm91cHMuZ29vZ2xlLmNvbS9hL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZvcnVtLz9taWQ9NDI3MjkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIyFmb3J1bS9zY290dXNkZWZlbmRlcnMvam9pbg&K=0A1N5p7CQozmYg15_2FHSA)**
|
---
Get Out the Vote Action
We need volunteers to send text messages; phone bank; and download, print, sign, and mail letters to voters in critical swing states.

There are only 35 days left until the election, and with many states starting early voting soon, we don’t have much time!

Please sign up for one or more Get Out The Vote efforts (text, call, or letters), and get every Trump voter you know to sign up too!
[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvZ1lhdGE2eDJLNktGSkx0SEE_bWlkPTQyNzI5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=H4hxDBlfJbNCBnw8vNMwxQ)
|
---
Sign Up to be a Poll Worker OR Help Someone Else Sign Up
There is still a drastic shortage of poll workers. [Use our very short How-To Guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI3MjkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=1-fTsVT5bU6XrWhGMLIAFw) to help you figure out if you are eligible and how to sign up.

**Note that NOW is the time to be signing up because there are usually trainings that you must be able to go through, and there will be deadlines for completing those trainings.**

Also, in many states, teens can sign up to be poll workers. Since many kids aren’t in school right now, get them to help! Plus, in most states, poll workers get paid, and what teen doesn’t want a little extra money?

If you can’t be a poll worker because of health issues, you might be able to help someone else sign up by offering to watch their kids. Again, since many kids aren’t in school right now, there might be parents who want to sign up, but need help watching their kids for the day.
[DOWNLOAD HOW-TO GUIDE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI3MjkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=gKsLxqMjDXF1rG1AGlJkdg)
|
---
Pledge to Vote in Person
The more mail-in ballots that are used, the easier it is for the left to steal the election. It’s as simple as that.

**The number one way we can stop this is to get as many voters to vote in person as possible, where it is appropriate. Therefore, if you are able, please sign this pledge to vote in person, and then make sure to do it!**

**NOTE:** If you are high-risk and need to stay away from public places for your health, or you live in a state where there is no in-person voting at all (like Washington state), this does not apply to you. We’ve also heard from an activist in New Jersey who said that in NJ, the situation may be different, so be sure to reach out to other activists in your state to see what they are saying about the best way to vote in your state.
[PLEDGE TO VOTE IN PERSON](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlaW5wZXJzb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDI3MjkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=L3wpJAn3U_RRbuE_BTTJnA)
|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of September 28th
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

**This week, we are recommending you watch a live virtual event from the Heritage Foundation, titled, “America on Trial: A Defense of the Founding,” on September 30, 2020 at 1:00pm eastern.[RSVP here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2FtZXJpY2FuLWZvdW5kZXJzL2V2ZW50L3ZpcnR1YWwtZXZlbnQtYW1lcmljYS10cmlhbC1kZWZlbnNlLXRoZS1mb3VuZGluZz9taWQ9NDI3MjkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=sc8evQG-SCn6Eh0PZzFAZw)**

The attacks on America’s founding, including our Founding Fathers, our founding documents, and principles, as well as attacks on today’s America, require deliberate push back. It is really important that your kids and grandkids receive regular education about American values, and learn the truth about our founding.

This virtual event will likely be more appropriate or interesting for older elementary and above, but it’s always good to have things like this playing in the background for your younger kids just to hear, even if they don’t understand it all.

Here is the description of the event:
_The Founding of the American Republic is on trial. Critics say it was a poison pill with a time-release formula; we are its victims. Robert Reilly declares “not guilty” in his new book, America On Trial: A Defense of the Founding. Learn more about the underlying drama: the conflict of might makes right versus right makes might. Reilly claims that the source of cultural decline is not to be discovered in the Founding principles, but in their disavowal._

_In honor of Dr. Russell Kirk, this lecture will trace the lineage of the ideas that made the United States and its system of ordered liberty possible. In the great and vital tradition of Dr. Russell Kirk, Reilly will help us understand American democracy. Dr. Russell Kirk argued that, although these roots run deep, they need watering from time to time. Join us for this timely and important conversation with Robert Reilly._
[Make sure to RSVP](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2FtZXJpY2FuLWZvdW5kZXJzL2V2ZW50L3ZpcnR1YWwtZXZlbnQtYW1lcmljYS10cmlhbC1kZWZlbnNlLXRoZS1mb3VuZGluZz9taWQ9NDI3MjkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=9dGKOguTFLNe_brV1NXq9Q) and get signed up for the event, so that you receive the log in information ahead of time. Also, if you can’t make the event live, if you RSVP, you will receive a link to watch it later after the event is over.

Once it’s over, discuss the points made by the presenter with your kids or grandkids, and answer any questions they may have.
|
---
Thank you!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjcyLWIxZTIzOGEyZjE4OTRlYTE5N2FlNzcwMmQ1NmM4YTNj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL2RvbmF0ZT9taWQ9NDI3MjkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=t2gcIN7v4G2CDGgNRgrOmA)

Peter,

Over the last couple of months, we’ve seen _**RELENTLESS**_ and _**BRUTAL**_ attacks on our police. **What’s worse is that Democrats are failing to condemn, or they are outright encouraging the unrest.** All while my liberal opponent, Jackie Gordon, remains silent while her party calls to _**DEFUND OUR POLICE!**_

clean_body: He endorsed Jon for Senate! | Friend, Jon Ossoff's momentum continues to grow. On Friday, President Barack Obama endorsed Jon in his quest to unseat David Perdue in Georgia! "" We're so thrilled to have President Obama on this team. He knows that Jon is an anti-corruption crusader who will clean up the mess in Washington. He knows Jon has what it takes to win in Georgia. And he knows if Jon wins this race, Democrats will retake the Senate. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" This endorsement has Jon surging, friend, but we're up against HUGE amounts of GOP money. Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more money against Jon than any other Democratic Senate challenger to save his majority. It's imperative we elect Jon in Georgia. Our campaign isn't taking contributions from corporate PACs or Congressional lobbyists -- this grassroots, small-dollar army is going to hit Wednesday's grassroots fundraising goal and power Jon to victory. clean_body: | | | | Peter, Most New Mexicans don’t know much about Ben Ray Lujan’s radical, far-left agenda, nor have they considered the disastrous effects his policies will have on our state if they’re passed. | Ben Ray Lujan is a co-sponsor of the Radical “Green New Deal”, which would eviscerate our state’s budget and kill thousands of jobs. This means reduced funding for our classrooms and healthcare and destroying the livelihood of countless New Mexicans. His support of the Green New Deal is just another example of Ben Ray Lujan putting radical DC-California policies ahead of what’s best for New Mexico. If you want a Senator who will do what's right for your state, instead of bending backwards to appease his party leaders, then | | | Within the Green New Deal is one of Ben Ray’s craziest, most backwards ideas: Providing guaranteed income to those who CHOOSE NOT TO WORK. This goes against the core of our New Mexico values and is a wasteful, pie-in-the-sky, Bernie Sanders-style “solution” to poverty that will DRAMATICALLY RAISE YOUR TAXES and do little to provide relief to working families. New Mexicans need real, concrete, achievable solutions that will improve their lives, not insane cash handouts that only serve to pander to Ben Ray’s radical, socialist base. If you want a leader that will stop the radical Green New Deal and put forward real, attainable solutions to our problems, then | Thank you so much for your support, Mark P.S. Ben Ray Lujan supports guaranteed income for those WHO CHOOSE NOT TO WORK. clean_body: Our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline is coming up in just two days, and Margaret needs your help. Friend, Our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline is coming up in just two days, and Margaret needs your help. We’ve set a big goal to raise $30,000 before Wednesday’s deadline, and we are making progress, but need our most trusted supporters like you to contribute right now to help us reach it. Not only is reaching this goal important to show the strength of our campaign -- powered by grassroots supporters here on the Suncoast, across Florida, and our nation -- our campaign needs the resources to contact people who just received their Vote by Mail ballots. They are deciding who to vote for in our election as we speak! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = As we reach this final stage of the campaign, we need to be in the best position possible to compete against Vern and his corporate backers, flip this seat from red to blue, and deliver accountability to Washington. We can win, but only if we can count on your support right now. Thank you, Alex Koren PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! subject: The Importance of Amy Coney Barrett
body:
Judge Amy Coney Barrett “is the latest example of a new generation of originalist judges whom Mr. Trump and the GOP Senate have elevated to... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42ce922650&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **_The Importance of Amy Coney Barrett_**

Judge Amy Coney Barrett “is the latest example of a new generation of originalist judges whom Mr. Trump and the GOP Senate have elevated to the federal bench. The numbers—three Justices and 53 appellate-court judges—are crucial, but more important is how they approach the law,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

“With rare exceptions, they think of themselves as protectors of the proper constitutional order, not as a third policy-making alternative to the political branches.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dba1e37137&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “We all have had the privilege of being Judge Barrett’s students. While we hold a variety of views regarding how best to interpret statutes and the Constitution, we all agree on this: The nation could not ask for a more qualified candidate than the professor we have come to know and revere,” six Notre Dame Law School alumni and students write in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7a2e431e7&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “As a result of President Trump’s substantial reforms to ObamaCare, premiums declined over the last two years for the first time since the flawed law was enacted. A staple of President Trump’s approach to health care reform is rooted in returning the choice to individuals as opposed to government bureaucrats,” Housing and Urban Development Secretary Ben Carson writes for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b71898cca&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The Department of Homeland Security seized nearly twice as many hard drugs at the U.S.-Mexico border during President Trump's first term in office than in President Barack Obama's two terms,” Anna Giaritelli reports. “We’re talking fentanyl, meth—those, that level of drug seizures,” DHS Deputy Secretary Ken Cuccinell said. Read more in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=659ed25469&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9cd63b669&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e66aff145a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e72e215821)
---

November 3rd 2020 *only 36 days away!

Why wait until November?
