name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Why this moment matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
The stakes in an election have never been higher. We are in the fight of our lives.
The Supreme Court is on the ballot. Affordable health care is on the ballot. Reproductive rights are on the ballot. Addressing the climate crisis is on the ballot. The future of our democracy is on the ballot.
The outcome of this election will have resounding impacts for generations to come. We need to do everything in our power to ensure we elect a Democratic President and flip the Senate. That's why our Sprint to 2020 program is so important: we can win these fights if we stand together.
**[I have a $40,000 fundraising goal and I need your support to get there before the FEC's end-of-quarter deadline on September 30. Will you pitch in $5 or any amount you can to join my Sprint to 2020 and help Democrats win in November?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200927-eoq?refcode=em200927i_492&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
**[](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200927-eoq?refcode=em200927i_492&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Your support so far has made an enormous difference -- Democratic Senate candidates across the country are breaking fundraising records and are in a strong position to flip red seats blue.
But we can't let our foot off the gas now -- not with so much at stake in this election. Meeting this $40,000 goal before September 30 is essential so we can keep up this must-win fight.
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 now toward this crucial goal?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200927-eoq?refcode=em200927i_492&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200927-eoq?refcode=em200927i_492&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a69338e/22080b68/7a200eaf/46021774/2530418779/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a69338e/22080b68/7a200eaf/4602177b/2530418779/VEsA/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

**To:** Peter
**From:** John Kasich
**Date:** Saturday, Sept. 26

I'm reaching out to you today about a special program we're launching.

We all know how dysfunctional America's politics are these days and that's especially the case with Congress, who have done very little these past years to successfully tackle the biggest challenges that we face.

But there is a bipartisan group of legislators that you may not know about that are part of the "[Problem Solvers Caucus.](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9ae7e481476d419a80f686e64d94034a&_e=57mDBdgapAtXgJH30p2gxYwe67HhePCumJIKb5LkRDIQsNNb_PgSs-_mq6hF1Z7PIATlg7NKmBZ0DnRbvi8VApw2l3Bl2qFSs_0pciHeG2Qs7YDu78cdn2H_hYlgfZBmN7RNNP5p_6TLzhzX3dmpMc08fRZB5I1wUaeKB_qc_KPjSpOIwqi6M4mZIjDlAvvHA45IWIROBV4cOvRnFLFuGqZ4t7n8eMkiZeEAl15lyxsPsZb_adL8ap1L4m-bkbQPbLcZ-XaqZJ4m8pJ5AI7s8W1IyuLXF-OZK_5jppuki9c%3D)" They are working tirelessly to build compromise and get our government working to improve the lives of people again.

The program we're launching today aims to raise the funds to make maximum allowable contributions to the Republican members of this group who are in competitive re-election campaigns.

They are doing good and honorable service to our country and with your help, we can ensure they can keep it up. **[Will you consider making a donation right now to help us hit our goal?](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9ae7e481476d419a80f686e64d94034a&_e=57mDBdgapAtXgJH30p2gxXlRPkVbeOdI11xoohF8w-zi3Yg_eXArFHx5fiaS-fVZIxkkg8RhMZiHE94MIlHX7e6sThpDWsKw_kCQ36vVI6eTvlfgLl73imS1F_Mq8q9RucZz7dv-yYGinb1gHnS1z7T7bazsG4FDHeol2uMpvCCuFe0FG5t0VzVphrVdCqvTgsmEu6VlAiDIRy-sJ9lmbEI9zIljY1tAArpHHhuNbtuBBO7LZnIEwCabtdmAQz3VgfE8WgdvoyMI_cn3TB7y8NVDoE145fro_7PkohxUgBo%3D)**
[ Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9ae7e481476d419a80f686e64d94034a&_e=57mDBdgapAtXgJH30p2gxXlRPkVbeOdI11xoohF8w-zi3Yg_eXArFHx5fiaS-fVZIxkkg8RhMZiHE94MIlHX7d60NF4ofwIWtpx-qkPo3St-ZDEObiqydbyTqT6OOYrQkKkms7mlVm_HyUnaLeqDDULGsmwNjDnFWEUC7PUa3crw-s0v2hWwbsg2D7hWPuSP4GCfo5SV6twQh2JgIrKGPNTt2xE3fNNQvX_EnDqopCIkP5AJRaMPUwY1zEb89C2SoG6em86k3U1gTPmTZwumcGF2hxJQRurYhRFiy82h-Aw%3D)

clean_body: We're reaching out to make sure that you saw Gov. Kasich's important message. We have a September deadline in two days and could use your help! | | Peter - we're reaching out to make sure you saw Gov. Kasich's important message. We have a September deadline in two days and -Team Kasich | To: Peter From: John Kasich Date: Saturday, Sept. 26 I'm reaching out to you today about a special program we're launching. We all know how dysfunctional America's politics are these days and that's especially the case with Congress, who have done very little these past years to successfully tackle the biggest challenges that we face. But there is a bipartisan group of legislators that you may not know about that are part of the "" They are working tirelessly to build compromise and get our government working to improve the lives of people again. The program we're launching today aims to raise the funds to make maximum allowable contributions to the Republican members of this group who are in competitive re-election campaigns. They are doing good and honorable service to our country and with your help, we can ensure they can keep it up. Thank you for your ongoing support! -John | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.www.JohnKasich.com

name: DNC HQ
subject: Haven’t heard from you in a while, Derek​
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
We’re running out of time to reach potential Democratic voters and make an impact on the outcome of this election. | |
---
Hi Derek -- It’s been a while since you last received an email from us, but we’re reaching out to you again because **we’re in the final stage of the most important election of our lifetimes -- and we need you.** There’s so much at stake at the ballot box this year, and a Democratic victory is going to take everyone on this team. Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats nationwide are counting on us to give this race our all, especially now that we’re nearing the finish line. You’ve expressed support for our party in the past, so I have to ask: **Derek, can we count on you to vote for Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats down the ballot this year?**
[ **YES, COUNT ME IN** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vWSczDM5JVQEwDVBPD9TM2M9gL1cn4MYrCvNs66DwQauT4FyWTMemPWzHzs0J1XwwT2vEHmQaHePz1e0rxjpK6TqDPSMWyKj6_8kckmSjY3YoiIWAqpXbq3j_HGm-sbspnmgRFD2Tt8Aq3fCMw09zZdiBf7smZ4uq9_usz--sbi0gTikBnbZsgc_ZEbIctevcjGTM1D6XluYeVPmXDVbYio7h7e-FoTQeFM6OwM-PULZQzdB8b7rJTqsVnUcfCpBq1p66SoZOehVlSxaTE222I6J9VvZBiz3-FnlDgbBAlGbrJH_crsLCm46J6DEmlQqBc-TCUNLE0bgFKlLndih9ye2H2jk75hw9s37HFRCpKMcV_qtGeDg0_o3AdQ8STIcl_dTXqY3Sj15IhOBYKIH2p7htMjK3JMALr38pKkc-7PqIulamZEXVSwy1isbc5ogg/35k/D3ukGqPPScy2HBpjbBUFtQ/h0/eidpCnUnxroJj-53unowtuHnXzERjuSJ1wJWjl3yvMg)
As you read this email, folks nationwide are already casting their votes. **Derek, the urgency of this moment cannot be overstated.** We’re running out of time to reach potential Democratic voters and make an impact on the outcome of this election. That’s why we need to know that you’re a committed member of this team -- someone who is dedicated to electing Democrats up and down the ballot in November. **[Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats all over the country are relying on your support in these final weeks of this race. Derek, before it’s too late: Can we count on you to vote for Joe and down-ballot Democrats this year?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vWSczDM5JVQEwDVBPD9TM2M9gL1cn4MYrCvNs66DwQauT4FyWTMemPWzHzs0J1XwwT2vEHmQaHePz1e0rxjpK6TqDPSMWyKj6_8kckmSjY3YoiIWAqpXbq3j_HGm-sbspnmgRFD2Tt8Aq3fCMw09zbuqktjUDARx-TjrPzNBSrKs9LwBXqeLRMMyST2MbmI2pBlPrUiRpKJ3jshT5hs8zzZSYsXODr5LxEAKkz0Zu6xdtdZhnXYr4AI0r1YHHN4XcsEFxkoJcp3jM71hisnvs0PlOX1EhRbDEgAfEaC11aDXGlcynNrryMoMZlafhdbaef2CqAzeTsOPtKNf9OP6YRe7BjkHMWlMBk-hHp7ljAmrm3NqTfcm1I3OEFL8kBhYzm3OGHx_cD6SQ-tVcde_16diZiBYcgSXve9YYQdlxhgU2tbWZjbHKtxiLS1BDGhZw/35k/D3ukGqPPScy2HBpjbBUFtQ/h1/7lTQRuskVp_icEYAmQXP0NiHn3ML_jd_dKH6zgRCSes)** In unity, Tom Tom Perez

clean_body: We’re running out of time to reach potential Democratic voters and make an impact on the outcome of this election. | | Hi Derek -- It’s been a while since you last received an email from us, but we’re reaching out to you again because we’re in the final stage of the most important election of our lifetimes -- and we need you. There’s so much at stake at the ballot box this year, and a Democratic victory is going to take everyone on this team. Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats nationwide are counting on us to give this race our all, especially now that we’re nearing the finish line. You’ve expressed support for our party in the past, so I have to ask: Derek, can we count on you to vote for Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats down the ballot this year? As you read this email, folks nationwide are already casting their votes. Derek, the urgency of this moment cannot be overstated. We’re running out of time to reach potential Democratic voters and make an impact on the outcome of this election. That’s why we need to know that you’re a committed member of this team -- someone who is dedicated to electing Democrats up and down the ballot in November. In unity, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee

Our final fundraising numbers are due in just over 24 hours and we just launched a money bomb to give our campaign a boost as we head into the final days of this race. We’re running out of time to – and with our quarterly fundraising deadline coming up in less than four days, we’re launching a money bomb to give our campaign a shot in the arm. Here’s how this money bomb works: You chip in $10.10 today and pledge to match that donation on our September 30th deadline for a total of $20.20 so that we can head into October and close out this race at full strength. name: Evergreen Events Team
subject: Last chance to register for tonight's BYOB event with John Podesta and Evan Weber
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Be there.
| Friend, Tonight's the night: our second-ever Policy + Pints BYOB happy hour! Tune in at 7:00 p.m. ET / 4:00 p.m. PT to watch and listen as Evergreen's political director, Maggie Thomas, talks with former Counselor to President Obama John Podesta and Sunrise Movement co-founder Evan Weber about what's at stake for the climate in the 2020 race -- one night before Joe Biden and Donald Trump share a debate stage for the first time. **[Register now before it's too late!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=2&akid=3276%2E53494%2EA1Q1Zc)** | [RSVP ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=3&akid=3276%2E53494%2EA1Q1Zc)
---
Cheers,
The Evergreen Events Team
\---- Forwarded message ----
From: Maggie Thomas, Evergreen Action
Date: Fri, Sep 25, 2020
Subject: Got pre-debate plans? Join me, CAP's John Podesta, and Sunrise Movement's Evan Weber
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=4&akid=3276%2E53494%2EA1Q1Zc)
Friend, the first debate between Joe Biden and Donald Trump is coming up next week!
To me, this sounds like the perfect opportunity for our next installment of Policy + Pints, Evergreen's exclusive1 virtual BYOB2 happy hour, where I'll talk with policy experts about their hopes for the debate and what's at stake for the climate in this election.
**[Will you join me on Monday, September 28, at 4:00 p.m. PT / 7:00 p.m. ET -- the night before the debate 3 \-- for our next installment of Policy + Pints?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=5&akid=3276%2E53494%2EA1Q1Zc)**
[RSVP ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=6&akid=3276%2E53494%2EA1Q1Zc)
---
Last month, I got to speak with two ~~fellow nerds~~ very special guests, Leah Stokes and Julian Brave NoiseCat, at our first-ever Policy + Pints event. We were so pleased to share the experience with hundreds of you!
And we've confirmed two heavy hitters in the climate fight for Monday's debate preview:
* **John Podesta** , founder of Center for American Progress and former Counselor to President Obama
* **Evan Weber** , co-founder and political director of Sunrise Movement

We'll sip drinks and talk through questions like: What questions do we want to hear moderators ask the candidates on climate? How should candidates respond to and defend climate plans? How does the Supreme Court vacancy affect the climate fight?
**[You won't want to miss this. RSVP today to join John, Evan, and me for Policy + Pints on Monday, September 28, at 4:00 p.m. PT / 7:00 p.m. ET.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=7&akid=3276%2E53494%2EA1Q1Zc)**
Thanks,
Maggie Thomas
Political Director, Evergreen Action
[RSVP ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=8&akid=3276%2E53494%2EA1Q1Zc)
---
1 Disclaimer: Actually not exclusive at all. Please forward this invite to any friends and family!
2 Go ahead, get creative with your beverage choice: Last time, Leah sipped tea, while Julian indulged in some maple water. And yeah, I had a beer.
3 This is also the end of Yom Kippur, for those who observe. Hope you have an easy and meaningful fast!
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=3276%2E53494%2EA1Q1Zc). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2020 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Donald Trump's tax returns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Well, no wonder Donald Trump fought so hard to keep his tax returns a secret. They paint an ugly picture of a crooked businessman. A cheater whose rickety finances are held together by scotch tape and | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251ce/45c30650/1c18981b1/66e897c2/127347862/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Well, no wonder Donald Trump fought so hard to keep his tax returns a secret.

They paint an ugly picture of a crooked businessman. A cheater whose rickety finances are held together by scotch tape and corruption. A president who is a walking, talking conflict of interest. A self-proclaimed billionaire **who paid just $750 in federal income taxes in 2016 and 2017.

He knows better than anyone that there's one set of rules for the wealthy and giant corporations and another for hardworking Americans** -- and instead of using his power to fix it, he's taken advantage of it at every turn.

But his time is just about up. This November, we are going to defeat him, elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and put Democrats into power across the country.

**[Help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot who will make our country work for everyone-- not just rich and powerful cheaters. If you're able to, please make a donation of $2 or whatever you can today. It will go a long way before Wednesday's big FEC deadline.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251ce/45c30650/1c18981b1/66e897c5/127347862/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjIzRl9FT1FfQ09SX0VfMjAyMDA5MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV23F_EOQ_COR_E_20200928_V1S1_P")**

Let's show Donald Trump and his Republican enablers that we are building the movement that will take power out of their hands.

Because this is about more than one man's personal tax scams.

Donald Trump has also taken advantage of a corrupt system that's built for people like him to do what he did.

A system that kicks dirt in the faces of teachers, nurses, janitors, farmworkers -- people who do more in a day to build up our country than Donald Trump has in a lifetime. People who work hard and pay it forward so the next kid can have a shot, too.

But this system doesn't exist because of some inevitable, natural force, like gravity. It only exists because billionaires and giant corporations have been able to write the rules in Washington. And that's not a given. As long as we win big this November, we'll have the chance to rewrite those rules -- and make them work for everyone.

But to win up and down the ballot, we need to throw ourselves into the fight and expand our grassroots organizing.

And that takes real resources.

**Warren Democrats in powerfully important races across the country are counting on grassroots donors to power them to victory.**

**[If you can, please pitch in right now to help fund the organizing that will make sure we win big in 2020 and start making real, systemic change in 2021 and beyond.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251ce/45c30650/1c18981b1/66e897c5/127347862/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjIzRl9FT1FfQ09SX0VfMjAyMDA5MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV23F_EOQ_COR_E_20200928_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: Well, no wonder Donald Trump fought so hard to keep his tax returns a secret. They paint an ugly picture of a crooked businessman. A cheater whose rickety finances are held together by scotch tape and | | | "" Well, no wonder Donald Trump fought so hard to keep his tax returns a secret. They paint an ugly picture of a crooked businessman. A cheater whose rickety finances are held together by scotch tape and corruption. A president who is a walking, talking conflict of interest. A self-proclaimed billionaire who paid just $750 in federal income taxes in 2016 and 2017. He knows better than anyone that there's one set of rules for the wealthy and giant corporations and another for hardworking Americans -- and instead of using his power to fix it, he's taken advantage of it at every turn. But his time is just about up. This November, we are going to defeat him, elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and put Democrats into power across the country. "" Let's show Donald Trump and his Republican enablers that we are building the movement that will take power out of their hands. Because this is about more than one man's personal tax scams. Donald Trump has also taken advantage of a corrupt system that's built for people like him to do what he did. A system that kicks dirt in the faces of teachers, nurses, janitors, farmworkers -- people who do more in a day to build up our country than Donald Trump has in a lifetime. People who work hard and pay it forward so the next kid can have a shot, too. But this system doesn't exist because of some inevitable, natural force, like gravity. It only exists because billionaires and giant corporations have been able to write the rules in Washington. And that's not a given. As long as we win big this November, we'll have the chance to rewrite those rules -- and make them work for everyone. But to win up and down the ballot, we need to throw ourselves into the fight and expand our grassroots organizing. And that takes real resources. Warren Democrats in powerfully important races across the country are counting on grassroots donors to power them to victory. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Karen Giorno
subject: Democrats Harvesting Ballots
body:
Laura is observing Yom Kippur until sundown tonight, but I wanted to reach out about a few things.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395021-930448-5214687-0b2fbc2976-ef5f2bac1e)
Patriot,

This is Karen Giorno.

Laura is observing Yom Kippur until sundown tonight, but I wanted to reach out about a few things.

First, we’re three days away from closing out the most critical fundraising quarter of the campaign.

[**Help us today by donating $10, $25, or more.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395021-930448-5214687-0b2fbc2976-ef5f2bac1e)

As Laura’s chief strategist, I’m VERY disturbed by the video Project Veritas released last night.

I’ve been involved in campaigns for decades, and the ballot harvesting uncovered by James O’Keefe is something I’ve known goes on by Democrat operatives – and he finally caught it on tape in Ilhan Omar’s district.

I SERIOUSLY doubt that’s the only place where this is going on.

Our best bet to beat Democrat voter fraud is by getting as many voters to the polls on Election Day.

[**Help us do that by donating whatever you can give now.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395021-930448-5214687-0b2fbc2976-ef5f2bac1e)

If you haven’t seen Project Veritas’ video – [**watch it here**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395021-930448-5214687-0b2fbc2976-ef5f2bac1e).

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395021-930448-5214687-0b2fbc2976-ef5f2bac1e)
This type of fraud, called ballot harvesting, typically preys upon our elderly.

Democrat operatives go into nursing homes and senior communities to “assist” with voting – but all they’re doing is stealing ballots, filling them out however they want, and mailing them in.

**It’s FLAT OUT FRAUD.**

And it’s why the Democrats put so much focus on absentee ballots.

**But it’s not working in Florida 21.**

We’ve had teams of volunteers knocking on doors across the district to ensure they DON’T turn over their ballots to ANYONE.

But this operation has costs, and that’s why we need a SURGE in donations in the next few days to help cover this vital effort.

If you haven’t already done so, [**please donate to fund our boots on the ground grassroots operation**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395021-930448-5214687-0b2fbc2976-ef5f2bac1e).

Respectfully,

Karen Giorno
Chief Strategist
Laura Loomer for Congress

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Defeat Sen. Cornyn (via MJ Hegar)
subject: 💸 How much does his vote cost? 💸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We've got receipts.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ceb/7f51f7bc/4403020a/4efa41ca/1722614717/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ceb/7f51f7bc/4403020a/4efa41c9/1722614717/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-septEOQ?refcode=email_20200928.2nd__2189__&amount=10")
---
Peter --

Sen. Cornyn has been in the Senate for 18 years, and he's spent that time fighting --not on behalf of Texans, but for special interests that line his pockets. Here are the receipts:
* He gutted _his own_ bill to reduce prescription drug costs **(while taking $1,392,747 from Big Pharma over his career)**

* He fought against meaningful gun safety laws after mass shootings devastated Texas communities **(he 's taken $258,749 from the gun lobby over his career)**

* He attacked immigration reform and protections for Dreamers **(while taking $90,800 from the private detention industry)**

* He's fighting to protect corporations whose negligence causes essential workers to contract COVID-19 **(while taking $1,898,723 from the insurance industry over his career)**

For Sen. Cornyn, it seems like a big checkbook is all you need to gain his support. Here's the thing about MJ that sets her apart -- she isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs. Her vote isn't for sale. **[Pitch in now to replace Sen. Cornyn.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ceb/7f51f7bc/4403020a/4efa41c9/1722614717/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-septEOQ?refcode=email_20200928.2nd__2189__&amount=10")**

Electing MJ means electing a senator who will fight to make sure:
* People with pre-existing conditions will have protections from predatory insurance companies

* Our communities have common-sense gun safety laws that the majority of Americans, including responsible gun owners, AGREE will make us safer

* Dreamers and asylum seekers will be protected

* Essential workers that we rely on during the pandemic will have safer workplaces

* And so much more

**Will you make a MATCHED donation today to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal and elect a fighter for Texas?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

subject: Working moms get things done 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
I would know. Eleven years ago I became the 8th woman to _ever_ give birth while serving in Congress. Since then, I've been a fierce advocate for expanding paid family leave and making child care more affordable.
Now, in the midst of an unprecedented health crisis, there's never been a better, _more critical_ time to pass policies that will ease the burden on working parents.
**[Stand with me | Chip in to my re-election campaign today so I can continue fighting for working families in Congress>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLyYqgaevn6aehJ1A0iVRvqA4c4cseFEfkL2jJwq_-U=/tYLPeQ3A0FiB2Ulswelr909A_-11ntwM_IZwC6dsBEM=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_092820_EOQ_F)**
The U.S. currently spends _far less_ on families and children compared to other developed countries. In fact, we're the _only_ industrialized country without a national paid family leave program. To make matters worse, child care costs have increased _approximately 2,000%_ since the 1970s, while wages have stagnated.
We **cannot** afford to go on like this.
Working families, _especially_ single-parent households, need Congress to **step up **and deliver common-sense policies like paid family leave and child care assistance.
**Here 's my promise: as long as I'm in Congress, I'll fight like hell to make life easier for children and families. **[**Will you join me in this fight by making a donation to my re-election campaign today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hLyYqgaevn6aehJ1A0iVRvqA4c4cseFEfkL2jJwq_-U=/tYLPeQ3A0FiB2Ulswelr909A_-11ntwM_IZwC6dsBEM=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_092820_EOQ_F)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Fighting to Protect RBG’s Legacy
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501147347%2501September%2bNewsletter%2b--%2bFINAL%2bVERSION%250115457.20621583.4884207.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501147347%2501September%2bNewsletter%2b--%2bFINAL%2bVERSION%250115457.20621583.4884207.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **September 28, 2020** |
---|---|---|---
| | | Our nation has lost a trailblazer for equality, a lover of justice, and a moral giant: the great Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Though small in stature, she had a towering impact on American law. [As I said on the Senate floor last week](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15457.20621583.4884207.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fvideos%2fvb.109304033877%2f1039723306486676%2f%3ftype%3d3%26theater&redir_log=655201535872622), Ruth Bader Ginsburg transformed America's legal landscape. Even before being appointed to the Supreme Court, she served as a fierce advocate for equal rights. After joining the high court as the second woman ever to sit on the bench, she often brought others over to her point of view through her intelligence and persuasion. When she could not, she wrote powerful dissents - what she viewed as conversations with the future - that she had faith would be vindicated in the years to come.
---
### Honoring RBG's Legacy
Following the news of Justice Ginsburg's passing, we saw an outpouring of support from across the country. Many gathered outside of the Supreme Court to celebrate her life and honor her legacy. For a moment, most of our nation took a pause to mourn together.

But in the United States Senate, Majority Leader Mitch McConnell didn't pause. Just over one hour after Justice Ginsburg's death was announced, Senator McConnell unveiled his newest political power play. He said that President Trump's nominee to replace Justice Ginsburg would get a vote on the floor of the Senate despite the fact that Americans are already voting in the 2020 presidential election.

The Majority Leader announced his commitment to rush the President's nominee through the confirmation process during an election year even though he took the opposite position in 2016 when President Obama nominated Merrick Garland. McConnell wants to use one set of rules for Democratic presidents and another for Republican presidents. The dishonesty and rank hypocrisy are obscene.

President Trump promised he would nominate a justice who would fall in line with his right-wing agenda, including striking down the Affordable Care Act and eliminating a woman's right to reproductive freedom. He has found that person in Amy Coney Barrett. Barrett is a far-right ideologue who has been an outspoken critic of the ACA and will vote to do away with many of the rights and freedoms we hold dear. Instead of focusing on addressing the COVID-19 crisis and providing the real relief Americans need, the President and Senate Republicans are hell-bent on confirming a right-wing justice who will dismantle Ruth Bader Ginsburg's legacy and strip away Americans' health care.

We must use every tool at our disposal to block this abuse of power. We have done it before and we can do it again. In 2017, the Senate stopped the Republican onslaught to repeal the Affordable Care Act by just one vote. We succeeded because the American people took action. Constituents picked up the phone, got on social media, and even occupied offices to protect the millions of people with pre-existing health conditions across this country. Now we must sound the alarm again.

In her final days, Justice Ginsburg said to her granddaughter: "my most fervent wish is that I will not be replaced until a new president is installed." We must honor this last request and protect the legacy of a true American hero committed to the guiding principle that all citizens are equal in the eyes of the law.
### Providing the Support Americans Need
As Senate Republicans focus on ramming through Trump's Supreme Court nominee, they are ignoring the real and immediate needs of the country. The American people are still facing the health and economic tolls of the COVID-19 crisis, but Mitch McConnell continues to block a Senate vote on the House-passed HEROES Act, which would provide emergency relief to workers, families, and small businesses struggling to stay afloat during this pandemic. Our country just surpassed the grim toll of 200,000 deaths from this virus, and now more than ever, the American people need real leadership. Instead, we've got a President who, for months, has knowingly worked to conceal the severity of this deadly disease and Republican Leader Mitch McConnell who is either unwilling or unable to grasp the urgency of this moment. I will continue to push Senate Republicans to come to the negotiating table to develop a meaningful bipartisan plan, as we were able to do in the spring with the comprehensive CARES Act.

Since the start of this crisis, I've held five telephone town halls to discuss the impacts of COVID-19 on Marylanders and their lives. I've had experts join me from Johns Hopkins, the University of Maryland, and more, to help inform the public and provide information about the nature of the pandemic and the ongoing relief efforts. Each time we've held one of these calls, I've promised Marylanders that I will continue fighting for the funding and the resources necessary to truly address the continuing health impact and economic pain of this pandemic. And I won't stop now. We must provide more relief immediately - and I won't let up until it gets done.
### Preventing a Shameful Shutdown
There is one piece of good news to share. Despite the President's previous efforts to instigate shameful shutdowns, the Congress has come together on a bipartisan basis to provide continued government funding through December. This bill - while just a temporary measure - will ensure federal funds will continue to flow to where they're needed most. I can guarantee you - we'll also be guarding closely against any attempts later this year to once again force our government into a shutdown.
### Exercising our Democratic Rights
In one of her most famous dissenting opinions, Ruth Bader Ginsburg argued against the majority ruling in Shelby County v. Holder - in which a 5-4 decision by the Court gutted a key provision of the Voting Rights Act and opened the floodgates to voter suppression. Justice Ginsburg knew the power of our democratic process and spoke out against those who would limit the constitutional right to vote. One of the best ways all Americans can honor her legacy is by casting their ballot in the November 3rd election.

As John Lewis said in his final words to the nation: "The vote is the most powerful nonviolent change agent you have in a democratic society." As Election Day draws near, Marylanders should have [all the information they need on the process for casting their ballot](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15457.20621583.4884207.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2felections.maryland.gov%2f&redir_log=644688930203218). The last day to register to vote in Maryland is October 13th. In-person early voting will be held from October 26th through November 2nd. For those planning to vote-by-mail in this election: your request for an absentee ballot must be received by your local board of elections no later than October 20th.

Another key way to participate in our democracy is by exercising your right to speak up and speak out. This past week we learned that none of the officers involved in the killing of Breonna Taylor will face charges for her murder. And many Marylanders rightfully continue to speak out against this injustice and the need for police reforms now. Breonna Taylor should be alive and smiling. We must overhaul the system that led to her unjust death and the absence of accountability for her killing. I will continue pushing Senator McConnell to hold a vote on the House-passed George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. This is just a first step, but it's past time we get to work on it.

Now more than ever, it's important for us to connect with one another. [I want to hear from you](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15457.20621583.4884207.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285) and hope you will continue to stay engaged. We're all in this fight - so let's raise our voices, together. Chris Van Hollen

P.S. Don't forget to [fill out the 2020 Census](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15457.20621583.4884207.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmy2020census.gov%2f&redir_log=574467404893169)!
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15457.20621583.4884207.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15457.20621583.4884207.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15457.20621583.4884207.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15457.20621583.4884207.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15457.20621583.4884207.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)

When she could not, she wrote powerful dissents - what she viewed as conversations with the future - that she had faith would be vindicated in the years to come. name: Martin Sheen
subject: Reaching out to you today about Christy Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hello Peter,

My name is Martin Sheen, though you may remember me as President Bartlet on _The West Wing._

I don't have the kind of _(fictional)_ power that I used to have as a _(fictional)_ president. But I've devoted my life outside of acting to political activism by doing everything I can to support the causes and candidates that I believe in, like Christy Smith.

Peter, it's not every day that you meet a candidate like Christy. She is the kind of leader that we tried to portray in _The West Wing's_ best moments -- inspiring, hard working, and dedicated to facing challenges head on and getting results.

**Right now, I'm reaching out to you because Christy has an important fundraising deadline coming up on September 30th.[Will you join me in supporting Christy at this key moment in her campaign by chipping in $5?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcad/29776869/88d2b12/569e0e9c/1163047319/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5Mjhfc2hlZW5lb3FfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200928_sheeneoq_in")** [RUSH A DONATION TO SUPPORT CHRISTY SMITH](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcad/29776869/88d2b12/569e0e9c/1163047319/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5Mjhfc2hlZW5lb3FfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200928_sheeneoq_in") If it's not personal it's impersonal, and as such no one cares. So to get a little personal, politics to me is about hope. It's about our children being able to experience a brighter, more just tomorrow because of what we fight for today. And that starts with voting.

Elections are a time where we come together as a country to decide whether or not the politics of our present represent who we are as Americans or if we've gone too far off track. In 2018, it was the American people who decided that enough was enough and elected one of the most diverse freshman classes into the House of Representatives.

And now, as we inch closer to November 2020, perhaps the most consequential election of our lifetimes, we are once again taking our voices to the ballot box. And Peter, I can't picture a better person to represent California's 25th district than Christy Smith.

Christy's determination, and commitment to fighting for Los Angeles and Ventura Counties is evident in her career and her character. She will bring values that are sorely needed to Washington and work to make life better for CA-25.

I've never run for office. But I've seen a lot of campaigns up close, so I know it's not easy. **Christy Smith needs all the support we can give her to win her election in November, so[we can't let her miss a single fundraising deadline between now and then.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcad/29776869/88d2b12/569e0e9c/1163047319/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5Mjhfc2hlZW5lb3FfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200928_sheeneoq_in")**

Thank you,

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcad/29776869/88d2b12/569e0e9c/1163047319/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5Mjhfc2hlZW5lb3FfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200928_sheeneoq_in")
Martin Sheen

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcad/29776869/88d2b12/569e0e9c/1163047319/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5Mjhfc2hlZW5lb3FfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200928_sheeneoq_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcad/29776869/88d2b12/569e0e9c/1163047319/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5Mjhfc2hlZW5lb3FfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200928_sheeneoq_in")
---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcad/29776869/88d2b12/569e0e9d/1163047319/VEsB/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
PO Box 301, 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy, Valencia, CA 91355.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcad/29776869/88d2b12/569e0e9e/1163047319/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bcad/29776869/88d2b12/569e0e9f/1163047319/VEsP/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Sri@sri2020.com
subject: including you on this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

Earlier today my campaign and I sent the email below asking for donations ahead of our upcoming FEC deadline at the end of the month.

As one of my top supporters I wanted to also forward this message along to you directly.

This FEC end-of-quarter deadline will be one of the final times our opponents get a good inside look into the strength of our campaign before the election, so we need to make sure that we’re on track to meet our goal. Can you help?

Conservative super PACs will use this report to decide how much money they need to spend against us, so it’s important that we have a very strong grassroots showing. Having a weak report will be a signal to outside groups that we’re in a vulnerable position, and that it’s worth their time and energy to blanket the air waves with negative ads against us.

Right now we have a $45,000 budget gap. If we can get your support tonight with anything you’re able to give, it would really help. >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b2_s@s2020_all&amount=25

Thank you,
Sri

--------Forwarded Message-------
Date: September 28, 2020
Sender: Sri Kulkarni
Subject: Can you donate $10?

Friend --

I’ll get right to the point: Can you donate $10 or more right now to our campaign? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b2_s@s2020_all&amount=10

I’m facing my last major quarterly FEC deadline at the end of this month, and could really use your help.

In the last stretch of this campaign, we’ve seen polls showing us tied with our opponent and Joe Biden running just 2 points down in Texas against Trump at the top of the ticket. This is great news for our campaign, BUT last week we also received news that one of the biggest Republican Super PACs in the entire country will spend nearly a million dollars on ads against Democrats in the Houston area between now and Election Day.

Let me be clear: This kind of outside spending could cost us the election.

If you can, please donate $10 or more now to help us respond and keep our own ads on the air >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b2_s@s2020_all&amount=10

Despite my opponent’s dangerous far-right record, the DC establishment is doubling down on their support for him in a last ditch effort to change this seat from flipping blue in November.

The DC establishment knows that if they spend enough money propping up Troy Nehls, not only will they keep this congressional seat red --- they’ll also be able to stop Joe Biden from flipping Texas blue and guaranteeing the White House for Democrats.
We can’t let this happen.

If we lose the House and the White House this fall, we will also lose our last line of defense in the fight to protect health care for those with pre-existing conditions, ensure a woman’s right to choose, and keep Medicare intact.

Please -- if you can -- our campaign needs your help to stay on the air and keep talking to voters. Even just $10 will go along.

Here’s a link to donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b2_s@s2020_all&amount=10

Thank you,
Sri

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 5 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b2_s@s2020_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.28_b2_s@s2020_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3d4e52ee-ab01-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc/15debb53-e201-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWRlYmI1My1lMjAxLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Wh0uFMdjw2hCKZsY0p9fEsjzFSNkSDKkQJSLlU1mps=&id=117373579 .

Friend -- I’ll get right to the point: Can you donate $10 or more right now to our campaign? >> I’m facing my last major quarterly FEC deadline at the end of this month, and could really use your help. In the last stretch of this campaign, we’ve seen polls showing us tied with our opponent and Joe Biden running just 2 points down in Texas against Trump at the top of the ticket. This is great news for our campaign, BUT last week we also received news that one of the biggest Republican Super PACs in the entire country will spend nearly a million dollars on ads against Democrats in the Houston area between now and Election Day. Let me be clear: This kind of outside spending could cost us the election. If you can, please donate $10 or more now to help us respond and keep our own ads on the air >> Despite my opponent’s dangerous far-right record, the DC establishment is doubling down on their support for him in a last ditch effort to change this seat from flipping blue in November. The DC establishment knows that if they spend enough money propping up Troy Nehls, not only will they keep this congressional seat red --- they’ll also be able to stop Joe Biden from flipping Texas blue and guaranteeing the White House for Democrats. We can’t let this happen. If we lose the House and the White House this fall, we will also lose our last line of defense in the fight to protect health care for those with pre-existing conditions, ensure a woman’s right to choose, and keep Medicare intact. Please -- if you can -- our campaign needs your help to stay on the air and keep talking to voters. Even just $10 will go along. Here’s a link to donate: Thank you, Sri Can you make it weekly? Friend -- we’re just 5 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down. Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way! MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#] If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Mark Warner Campaign HQ
subject: Your donation can keep VA blue, re-elect Mark, and flip more Congressional districts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek, did you know that with a **_single donation,_** you can help
1. re-elect Mark Warner;
2. help elect Joe Biden; and,
3. boost down-ballot Virginia Democrats running in close races?

All of this can happen if we send Mark back to the Senate with a resounding victory! **[Can you donate today to re-elect Mark Warner,_and_ flip more districts in the Commonwealth?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da92/53d9897e/5585f004/1c881cbb/3150947227/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-downballot?refcode=20200928_f_1_nd__830__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Let us explain more what we're talking about. Here's how this has happened in the past:

When Senator Tim Kaine won re-election in 2018, he won seven out of Virginia's 11 congressional districts. Democratic congressional candidates _also_ won in those seven districts, but they _fell short_ in the districts that Senator Kaine lost.

We expect this same pattern to repeat itself in the 2020 election. If Mark wins his race by a large enough margin, he can help boost down-ballot candidates in their own races, which is especially important in toss-up districts like VA-05, where Dr. Cameron Webb faces an extreme GOP opponent.

Our goal is simple: we're trying to do everything in our power to help Mark win his race, so down-ballot Democrats can _**also**_ win their competitive races.

**[Will you help us reach our end-of-quarter (the last one before Election Day!) goal and help send Mark Warner back to the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da92/53d9897e/5585f004/1c881cba/3150947227/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-downballot?refcode=20200928_f_1_nd__830__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for all of your support!

-- Team Warner | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da92/53d9897e/5585f004/1c881cb9/3150947227/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-downballot?refcode=20200928_f_1_nd__830__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da92/53d9897e/5585f004/1c881cb8/3150947227/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Brianna Carmen (at Voto Latino)
subject: Let me explain.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO
body:
With only 36 days until Election Day, I’m reaching out to explain why our team at Voto Latino urgently needs your support. |
#
Peter --

**With only 36 days until Election Day, I’m reaching out to explain why our team at Voto Latino urgently needs your support.** If you don’t have time to read my full message, you can show your support right here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vl-urgent](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19676549/254024127/-129957944?refcode=20200928&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmM4YzYyZS1lNjAxLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5zdAgB7q8usjVjdLy1dlWD0NRUh9QtWR8vtEjW528Kk=)**.

First, let us point out that Trump paid $750 in taxes in 2016. Undocumented workers paid $27,000,000,000. Let’s vote out the grifter. **[Can you help us do it?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19676550/254024128/-129957944?refcode=20200928&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmM4YzYyZS1lNjAxLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5zdAgB7q8usjVjdLy1dlWD0NRUh9QtWR8vtEjW528Kk=)**

Peter, the pandemic threw a _giant_ wrench into our plans to register a record number of Latinx voters across the country. **[Thanks to supporters like you,](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19676551/254024129/-129957944?refcode=20200928&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmM4YzYyZS1lNjAxLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5zdAgB7q8usjVjdLy1dlWD0NRUh9QtWR8vtEjW528Kk=)** we’ve been able to keep up our momentum.

**But we’re facing a lot of obstacles: An aggressive Spanish-language right-wing disinformation campaign is spreading quickly across Florida.** Its aim is to persuade Latinx voters in the critical battleground state to vote for Trump by pushing lies about Joe Biden, Democrats, and the overall election through ads on social media. And what’s most frightening: New polls suggest it’s working! Voto Latino is fighting back as hard as we can.

**Another major concern is that poll numbers are tightening in Texas, Florida, and Arizona.** All three of these battleground states could determine the election -- so their significance really can’t be overstated. But as poll numbers tighten there, our chances of electing a new president diminish. We urgently need to register thousands more Latinx voters in these states -- and the deadline is in just SEVEN DAYS!

**Finally, we still need to register 500,000 new voters.** We’ve made great progress, but with barely a month to go until Election Day, we’re still further from our goal than we want to to be. This goal isn’t arbitrary -- it is a true number of new voters we need to exert real influence and make sure OUR VOICES are heard in this election.

**Bottom line: There is no chance of sending a new president to the White House without the Latinx vote.** That’s why we _cannot_ slow down our efforts -- in fact we need to ramp them up. And with so little time left before the election, we’ve never needed your support more. **Can we count on you to come through for us today?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19676552/254024130/-129957944?express_lane=true&refcode=20200928&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmM4YzYyZS1lNjAxLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5zdAgB7q8usjVjdLy1dlWD0NRUh9QtWR8vtEjW528Kk=)

name: Team Freitas
subject: Townhall + Presidential Debate Watch Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, With the election less than 40 days away, Team Freitas invites you to join Nick for a **Presidential Debate Watch Party** and**participate in his weekly town hall** , which will be broadcasted with a live audience just before the debate starts! For the last twenty-five weeks, Nick has been hosting his Tuesday Night Town Hall LIVE in-studio and at events around Virginia's 7th district. This Tuesday, we're going to be mixing it up, and Nick will be hosting LIVE from Atlas 42 in Henrico County! You can attend in person (encouraged) or join at [NickForVA.com/live](NickForVA.com/live). clean_body: Friend, With the election less than 40 days away, Team Freitas invites you to join Nick for a Presidential Debate Watch Party andparticipate in his weekly town hall , which will be broadcasted with a live audience just before the debate starts! For the last twenty-five weeks, Nick has been hosting his Tuesday Night Town Hall LIVE in-studio and at events around Virginia's 7th district. This Tuesday, we're going to be mixing it up, and Nick will be hosting LIVE from Atlas 42 in Henrico County! You can attend in person (encouraged) or join at NickForVA.com/live. mailto:RSVP@nickforva.com?subject=Townhall%20%2B%20Debate%20Watch%20Party&body=Team%20Freitas%2C%20I%20look%20forward%20to%20joining%20you%20at%20Atlas%2042%20Tuesday%20night%21%20 So come join Nick for some food and drink and ask any question you have live and in-person for everyone at the event and the thousands that watch online every week! name: Senate Update (via Team Durbin)
subject: what we're up against in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
In November, Dick Durbin is facing not one, but two opponents who are working to unseat him.
His Republican opponent wants to dismantle the Affordable Care Act and roll back reproductive rights.
And the so-called independent in the race? He supported Donald Trump's election in 2016. And he's already written himself a multi-million dollar check in an effort to buy a seat in Mitch McConnell's Senate.
**[We're in a strong position to defeat these challengers and keep Illinois blue -- but we can't take anything for granted. That's why we are setting a $50,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal to keep this campaign on track. Contribute $5 right now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-200928-eoq?refcode=em200928i_1013&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Recent headlines and polling numbers have provided an encouraging boost to Democratic Senate campaigns across the country. More than ever, it seems that a Democratic Senate is within our reach in this election. But we can't afford to lose any ground in blue states like Illinois.
If we are going to send Mitch McConnell and his GOP majority packing in November, we all need to do our part to defend our Democratic seat here in Illinois by re-electing Dick Durbin.
**[Peter, we're facing a crucial FEC end-of-quarter deadline on September 30. Will you step up and make a $5 donation now to support Dick Durbin's campaign?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-200928-eoq?refcode=em200928i_1013&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thanks,
Team Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-200928-eoq?refcode=em200928i_1013&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *

clean_body: | | | | Democrat Fundraising Machine Gets Behind Ben Ray This morning, Vice President Biden joined Former President Barack Obama in endorsing my opponent, Nancy Pelosi’s Assistant Speaker of the House Ben Ray Lujan. Ben Ray now has the full backing of the Democrat Party machine and they are planning on pouring MILLIONS OF OUT OF STATE DOLLARS into this race so they can BUY THIS SENATE SEAT. **Now Is The Time for Our Movement to Step Up | | | | We can’t afford to let Ben Ray Lujan’s huge out of state fundraising haul go unmatched. That’s why we are asking you to go all in on our campaign. In the final 5 weeks of this race, will you be one of our supporters who steps up and makes a difference? We need 100 of our supporters to sign up for a $10 weekly recurring donation between now and election day in order to curb Ben Ray’s momentum.** Thank you so much for your continued support, Mark P.S. Vice President Biden endorsed my opponent, Nancy Pelosi’s Assistant Speaker of the House Ben Ray Lujan. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: It only takes a few seconds
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's one important thing that everybody can do to stop the spread of COVID-19: monitor your symptoms daily.
Luckily, the CRUSH COVID app on both [Apple](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j6SShrjFqIgWcNQd4oXT0T-_4p-_0EHCUREN6GAczsd3YRbGZXIPzr67d2boQV3q4HRjBMCcBUqSztQ4JhKtsR-JmJwYQpgjnPIRqRmF8m09uWoq5qPMWe_MyFXSY5zJxtkHsS1dX512mOJ1IoUPnnWNVbcidANL7BSxZ1eRvGiCjgN8PgHAzAUrO-d5_vt4Yt_sfwaQTKh728NYbqUE9A==&c=7oN1L_liUYk5KWbw1lqyjAEzZ7GHLpKGn7KQjQGmnLyIkpDGo1h_3Q==&ch=hQ01yaombxQL39GIs7oYQpLDu1mTY7sKKJl54l-LwYyacxmOygKLVw==) and [Android](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j6SShrjFqIgWcNQd4oXT0T-_4p-_0EHCUREN6GAczsd3YRbGZXIPzr67d2boQV3qkYh5v2Qm-O90CxV-71i3PV7uHdFGjdTzeGxTnVoW9t48ZKzVHMO4UcksGLyeWqlDRbCkRM2RoKapIfFg2u5AAxycufgSgS6JJKawCGbsyKAHS-mtoJjh5e1AbKU5wpY55JxiPUkIxHQTn-R3i4atYw==&c=7oN1L_liUYk5KWbw1lqyjAEzZ7GHLpKGn7KQjQGmnLyIkpDGo1h_3Q==&ch=hQ01yaombxQL39GIs7oYQpLDu1mTY7sKKJl54l-LwYyacxmOygKLVw==) devices makes it easy to check your symptoms in seconds and know if you're good to go. I do it every day, so I made a [quick video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j6SShrjFqIgWcNQd4oXT0T-_4p-_0EHCUREN6GAczsd3YRbGZXIPzrUJXl3BSbB5WUJoc_uRUjCbvxNxpysCxPdya501U2RQnCOYidtZ5gnbpRXOO6h84yXh7v9P73BRiwUmvqivp1jFR3h7xTgQ5zgtMDiJC9JRRqe_g89eHUQ=&c=7oN1L_liUYk5KWbw1lqyjAEzZ7GHLpKGn7KQjQGmnLyIkpDGo1h_3Q==&ch=hQ01yaombxQL39GIs7oYQpLDu1mTY7sKKJl54l-LwYyacxmOygKLVw==) to show you how. All you have to do is answer a few questions, and in a matter of seconds, you'll get either a green smiley face indicating you can go about your day, or a red frown face indicating you should stay home and get tested.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j6SShrjFqIgWcNQd4oXT0T-_4p-_0EHCUREN6GAczsd3YRbGZXIPzrUJXl3BSbB5WUJoc_uRUjCbvxNxpysCxPdya501U2RQnCOYidtZ5gnbpRXOO6h84yXh7v9P73BRiwUmvqivp1jFR3h7xTgQ5zgtMDiJC9JRRqe_g89eHUQ=&c=7oN1L_liUYk5KWbw1lqyjAEzZ7GHLpKGn7KQjQGmnLyIkpDGo1h_3Q==&ch=hQ01yaombxQL39GIs7oYQpLDu1mTY7sKKJl54l-LwYyacxmOygKLVw==)
---
| The latest update for CRUSH COVID also lets you check and track the symptoms of others in your household, which is particularly useful if you have children in school.
If you complete the symptom tracker and get a red frown face, you need to stay home and schedule a test. If you're a student, teacher or school staff member, you can do that by calling the PreK-12 Test Scheduling Service at 844-857-1814. If you're not associated with a school, you can schedule a test by calling your doctor or a community health clinic. And if you don't have any symptoms but work in a high-contact business, recently traveled to a state on Rhode Island's [quarantine list](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j6SShrjFqIgWcNQd4oXT0T-_4p-_0EHCUREN6GAczsd3YRbGZXIPzrUJXl3BSbB5EYJ60e7aNDHS6Swz9mrradm8OX_F7aaPGw8PnAWYqvgTpNHB2nxrU-e2zhsGUjHHyNALiKr-xh5pioIjTKMqf1qcssTsFocYXjh6hJiMDb9KYVvH0TrVhJgx5V7g16jiQhpxUuWpz7j5xcg6UDvmkqt0hRLBSat5f7L9CfYG1DtY_ADcbsyJDDNgxRUQLr4m0-qksCpMMMRaDk-4l3a7y6eBsfJf7_mB43NeQUZhFg4G7vgXuZkojUEkoKfLg1nD4gmi0AChCEmJ6ApMFkvUTjdvOcUdzL7E&c=7oN1L_liUYk5KWbw1lqyjAEzZ7GHLpKGn7KQjQGmnLyIkpDGo1h_3Q==&ch=hQ01yaombxQL39GIs7oYQpLDu1mTY7sKKJl54l-LwYyacxmOygKLVw==), or are between the ages of 18-39, you can schedule a test at [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j6SShrjFqIgWcNQd4oXT0T-_4p-_0EHCUREN6GAczsd3YRbGZXIPzlFSJhEr7BDbVccJBsogcpYLrbqxejZkTszjX1jV3716-MN0lp3htcMJsOtRNR8p6HjDWJQxDBzNDCgIwPnC9OI=&c=7oN1L_liUYk5KWbw1lqyjAEzZ7GHLpKGn7KQjQGmnLyIkpDGo1h_3Q==&ch=hQ01yaombxQL39GIs7oYQpLDu1mTY7sKKJl54l-LwYyacxmOygKLVw==).
Download the Crush COVID app in the [Apple App Store](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j6SShrjFqIgWcNQd4oXT0T-_4p-_0EHCUREN6GAczsd3YRbGZXIPzr67d2boQV3q4HRjBMCcBUqSztQ4JhKtsR-JmJwYQpgjnPIRqRmF8m09uWoq5qPMWe_MyFXSY5zJxtkHsS1dX512mOJ1IoUPnnWNVbcidANL7BSxZ1eRvGiCjgN8PgHAzAUrO-d5_vt4Yt_sfwaQTKh728NYbqUE9A==&c=7oN1L_liUYk5KWbw1lqyjAEzZ7GHLpKGn7KQjQGmnLyIkpDGo1h_3Q==&ch=hQ01yaombxQL39GIs7oYQpLDu1mTY7sKKJl54l-LwYyacxmOygKLVw==) or [Google Play](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j6SShrjFqIgWcNQd4oXT0T-_4p-_0EHCUREN6GAczsd3YRbGZXIPzr67d2boQV3qkYh5v2Qm-O90CxV-71i3PV7uHdFGjdTzeGxTnVoW9t48ZKzVHMO4UcksGLyeWqlDRbCkRM2RoKapIfFg2u5AAxycufgSgS6JJKawCGbsyKAHS-mtoJjh5e1AbKU5wpY55JxiPUkIxHQTn-R3i4atYw==&c=7oN1L_liUYk5KWbw1lqyjAEzZ7GHLpKGn7KQjQGmnLyIkpDGo1h_3Q==&ch=hQ01yaombxQL39GIs7oYQpLDu1mTY7sKKJl54l-LwYyacxmOygKLVw==) and start tracking your symptoms today!
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j6SShrjFqIgWcNQd4oXT0T-_4p-_0EHCUREN6GAczsd3YRbGZXIPzrUJXl3BSbB5OCpvtNGCNcfmy9mtSaYawi8_OhCBlSEsPp2Fw42K9NJ23ZSJLr0fit3krUuje3ru0BClrbyAc09rUS-791iOyPj1mL85I5I_nQVeKOLtp7eWtTfIZo0EVMHVYJBCMqCLttLJg487CS2lVNb4Ze66FXCs9b-x5fVf2yZ_KhapQLpr59HIUNHaPEKXWDd-tTEKDw2V0PEpGjArMzFzV6vOeK9dujIWbwxX7SRtW8-uJqjIwn8BgeTlb1BaEJ-tCJUx-PmysVVqJU4=&c=7oN1L_liUYk5KWbw1lqyjAEzZ7GHLpKGn7KQjQGmnLyIkpDGo1h_3Q==&ch=hQ01yaombxQL39GIs7oYQpLDu1mTY7sKKJl54l-LwYyacxmOygKLVw==).

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Arkansas should vote YES on Issue 3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
In just a few weeks, President Trump and I will be on the ballot. I would be honored to have your vote. I’m also asking you to vote YES on Issue 3, a ballot amendment that you’ll see this election. Issue 3 would reform Arkansas’s process for amending our Constitution to protect our state from liberal billionaires like George Soros who are trying to buy the election.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=43563234&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MjM2MjE5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjMyMzQS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MjM2MjE5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,
In just a few weeks, President Trump and I will be on the ballot. I would be honored to have your vote.

I’m also asking you to vote YES on Issue 3, a ballot amendment that you’ll see this election.

Issue 3 would reform Arkansas’s process for amending our Constitution to protect our state from liberal billionaires like George Soros who are trying to buy the election.

I wrote an op-ed making the case to vote YES on Issue 3 which I’ve included below. Please, share this op-ed and tell your friends and neighbors—vote YES on Issue 3 to protect Arkansas from liberal billionaires.

In service, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjMyMzQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MjM2MjE5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1NjMyMzQS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MjM2MjE5MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 For Issue 3 This fall, Arkansans should vote YES on Issue 3 to make the process for amending the Arkansas Constitution fairer and better for Arkansas. Issue 3, if passed, will protect Arkansas’ rural counties, promote transparency, and stop out-of-state liberal billionaires from rigging our elections.

Arkansans can amend our state Constitution by gathering signatures to demonstrate popular support for a proposed amendment, and then putting that amendment on the ballot for voters to decide. Some of the amendments that have been passed through this process have been good for Arkansas, like banning public funding of abortion. But the process is not perfect.

One problem is that a petitioner trying to amend the Constitution only needs to gather signatures from 15 of Arkansas’s 75 counties. Thus, a petitioner can get enough signatures to put a constitutional amendment on the ballot without a single signature from 60 counties. If you live in a small or rural county, you may have never seen a canvasser because petitioners trying to amend the Constitution usually focus their signature-gathering efforts on Arkansas’ largest counties, leaving smaller counties out of the process.

Further, the timeline for putting an amendment on the ballot is rushed and can confuse voters. Petitioners are not required to submit signatures for a constitutional amendment until four months before the election. What follows is the laborious counting and verification of signatures, oftentimes litigation against the petition, and potentially more signature gathering. This compressed timeline leads to uncertainty as to whether an amendment will appear on the ballot, often until just before the election.

Finally, the current process includes a “cure period,” which effectively rewards petitioners for submitting invalid signatures with a second chance to gather more signatures to “cure” their original failures. This second chance extends the legal uncertainty and provides an opportunity for special interests with enough money to pay for more signatures if they didn’t get enough the first time.
These dynamics make it difficult for normal Arkansans to amend the Constitution.

But wealthy and powerful interest groups have enough money to get around these hurdles. This year, liberal out-of-state billionaires paid more than $3 million to collect signatures and try to get initiatives on the ballot to change Arkansas’ elections. Thankfully, they failed. But they recognized that with enough money, they could take advantage of Arkansas’ current process for amending the Constitution. They even described Arkansas as “a kind of laboratory for the country.” That’s right — they wanted to treat Arkansans like lab rats.

The good news is Arkansas can fix these problems by voting yes on Issue 3. The Arkansas State Chamber of Commerce, the Arkansas Farm Bureau, and the Republican Party of Arkansas all support Issue 3 because it will make our process for amending the Constitution fairer, more transparent, and less likely to be abused by liberal out-of-state billionaires.

Issue 3 would give rural and small Arkansas counties more input in this process by requiring petitioners to gather signatures from 45 Arkansas counties instead of the current 15-county requirement. This reform will ensure that amendments genuinely have broad support across the state by including our smaller counties meaningfully in the petition process.

We would have also more transparency and certainty with the passage of Issue 3 because the deadline for submitting petitions to the Secretary of State would be January of the election year, giving Arkansans much needed time to decide if they support or oppose each initiative. That way, it will be less likely that you learn about the amendments for the first time when you step into the voting booth.

Finally, Issue 3 would eliminate the so-called “cure period” that allows petitioners to drag out the process and even submit fraudulent signatures if they later correct the problem. Arkansas should require only legitimate, verified signatures by the deadline before we amend our state Constitution.

Arkansans have a chance to improve our constitutional amendment process and make it fairer for everyone. That’s why I’m urging you to vote YES on Issue 3, and tell your friends and neighbors to do the same. Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.
